# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

Friends,

It’s been only two weeks with Trump in power, and already the fragile MAGA 2024 coalition is coming apart.

Donald Trump is preparing to revoke the legal status of many migrants who came to the U.S. legally from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua and Venezuela. Most of these people are refugees seeking a better life in America.

The move is a stunning (yet not unexpected) betrayal of many voters who helped elect Trump. And it is having an effect in this race: **Latino voters in Florida are angry, upset, and looking for revenge** —and a way to fight back and stop Trump’s most drastic measures.

|

_Trump: "I don't care about you, I just want your vote..." We can't say Trump voters weren't warned..._

Josh Weil is a public school teacher and a father — and **_our best chance to flip a House seat and snatch away the GOP’s razor-thin House Majority_**.****

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Exciting News on the Horizon - Stay Tuned!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=12ce481e79&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=2855021827&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8329c9fbf4&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**

Peter,

## Before you get busy, I need to ask you a personal question...

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ojm6bio09od1o69v1v98sudnqp2fdq8ukh5hm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh8ql5mff2oloakgi5pc3jdpbrt08ii4ehmpo71g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o72c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoj9bp1micvdour7p4i20s04mi7rf7g268dqhee8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o72c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh004inqe9l8ifvndonhfts6aa99rppi27ll7i6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o72c5h2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpret8lh5v8n47bp3s7s2vem65o89h2g3lklt3e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o72c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeu7ub9ltt76i73us0mvi85l3vm1s4t1s1fhdl00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o76c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znq54b2prr6qjb4gercnvdkhhbq47h2q934cn0d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o76c9h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zab1r5anadeo249k50jjp87dcdk97lg3lsq7gon8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie1o76c9h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Trump Train News

It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcfkh1u544t0pa39heo6b3u6c67qb0svdctdgi68_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztujl057scabdh7luo45l4jttlm3usujtvap9jag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6fb8u6vh15a4dgd1dctj5qlsfsi7r0gg5nsr4e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**href="https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer?sc=00711N0242L15DODEES &utm_source=prospecting&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ancientchristianity_dvd&utm_content=TRAILER_PA-AAN-20250209">https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn228ab25bnjf9t3673ea2unedgrhabn5lhnn9oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Power of Attitude: A Life-Changing Message
body:
Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjpqgjvd3qrdrvh24favkeevpu3fd5r45g2kdhgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv2692fs7tc11eeatoj3fm7bat04pisng2j5vqh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze94f2qash7scnjtmm1bb1160njdfg634th9uro8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1ie9pr6c3h2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqgkq5onbh903hdbbfqbv9ua5dtvnq5rrg2ibl7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg68pb2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0dgcvcvo5eubm8i94iquge3bvsobpjokfhfhdg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg68pb2c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z469n0r5kk09lt1pfqpmnvtijj3eu8p8jnq9mv6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg68pb2c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj5fn528r7jnejo87c1k14knukno68q431346h98_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg68pb2c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg2bq086efrl627uf83fkkd4ot9ppgjn6c8ip58o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg68pb2c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Attitude Matters—Here’s How It Can Change Your Life
body:
It was November of 1989.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z38sb7q9d4mpeavor7hrveq3um528bk7bp2u3ibo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg64ob0cjh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjs20qvqb29lievg7l8j8ll788valkss710v34o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg64ob0cjh2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6a3uush7psiksf85dvbdebbukat5voftdn7hgh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg64ob0cjh2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z16fp6jlrl8ruc0hkmp4hjfn9g5qqg4kjrpo7op0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg64ob0cjh2bs)
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Hillsdale College Via American Briefing
subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlb4nchu8hkclameut8bift6qmbbeabjfb4rrga0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg62oj6cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zunpod4upqgkp84253qpaphus7ob4fg465lbi248_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg62oj6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2f5pi8gcssfmpcjddtsife5as8c8i04fvkkk5fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg62oj6cjh2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---

subject: RE: Verify your profile for your zip code

body:
#################################

Friend,

**[BIG NEWS:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5b3t79roa588licp9uo2p39l63f6vf2lc5hf0qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4shg6ap30c3h2bs) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

_We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats._

**[So, can you take a few moments to complete this vital Verification Questionnaire?

name: Trump Knife Set
subject: Elevate Your Collection with the Exclusive Trump Knife Set
body:
Limited Edition Trump Knives – Claim Yours Before They're Gone!...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/d32171253e46933a557a7da55e5e8abd9b9538c7/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)
---
| | |
---
_February 9th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/2eed20b5660012549506ec6714c0f464f0cf9560/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/d32171253e46933a557a7da55e5e8abd9b9538c7/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/2eed20b5660012549506ec6714c0f464f0cf9560/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/d32171253e46933a557a7da55e5e8abd9b9538c7/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)
---
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/2eed20b5660012549506ec6714c0f464f0cf9560/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover. The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/d32171253e46933a557a7da55e5e8abd9b9538c7/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)
---
**An Heirloom for Generations** This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. **What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors** The **Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. **[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/2eed20b5660012549506ec6714c0f464f0cf9560/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)** Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20231/6374453/d32171253e46933a557a7da55e5e8abd9b9538c7/35ef092747f24c5da7c6d5ed243f91abe0630ac0)
---
|
---
|
---

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---

514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! subject: Super Bowl Sunday, Homemade Steel, and Orchid Camouflage
body:
The Kansas City Chiefs will try to become the first team to [win the Super Bowl three straight seasons](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvTk67s4QDwxdsqVrRwvDEVORYGGaKP--cveOnz7pPel9XeerSzk9bp_uLrbFMiPgOAAOMM3BpfyeuQ82iqBQL1YZmmA6n0fuV-vPoEUTEropSFhIaUdePDChG1n3yR40QJiUAhjxxEwLBTJGnApsYscgIbVST98lPdoqMb_LU-rJl3uf7dratnf00eGlw4vbHvLaj-sYtSWfpcPL_rNJHZbyykNbq8gmrg1R-8WMi1LiyajoWfvAIOyDM8ag9NWG7ZVyTrs2HcPt7lL-s7b_Kjwt_gYAAP__UgtdhA) on Sunday when they face the Philadelphia Eagles at Caesars Superdome in New Orleans.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kT3PnDAMgH9N2HJynEDIkKESx_ZWeqVKVScUiANpA5wgHL1_X9GPoarq0X782JY_v3VvLqa4jB_dTDaHtUPAkgNyMJ13Mb06VXgbiJBkQVZoacDUdamKyeoaldAGQRnotRIYBjDaBUWo-gC6iPayAYIRAqDEm1Kyl15qTU54pQNTQD7mdbt9XeOSJwrptT5puw3rXCQ75fzYmfzAsGXYnud5G9fk95ietH2LmdPsYrpYhm2fDuJghEF14bLdwxA9k40G8T7BFe_3-5fvDKu0M9kACH6_-vmniXj7ay7DaliYbOqy5JUpuTIIDKsjz92-HttATDZ_41dpJh-Pmcnmp-93cnDzw8Vx-XeDYrP-ccaU4l5ppmD8c0WR__eBp8UfAQAA__91jYHh) | |
# Sunday, February 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day In 1942, Congress adopted [daylight saving time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFurDAQheGnMZ3ReGzWULi4Dd3eNiUy6wEmMrDCk0W8fbRR2tSfdI70f9yHe-TM2_w_rhRk2gcEbDSghm5IkfM1uCqFiQjJVhSMtx10bdu4agljCwQ334FtRhqxM7fmAcY-WtMmT5OvOLzXAKEzBqDB2jk72mS9p2iS85NyQIllP-rPnTdZaMrX_qKjfuxrlcMi8izK_lPYK-zP86wXLrIf19sV9rJw0Slemjf9Kwr7FK_M8yK6xBdvsxZeSfNWhOVLKFVHSM-Tc-Zy88rBvEbOP4fyV4BXwO8AAAD__xHsXrc), originally called "war time," advancing standard time by one hour in each time zone to conserve fuel and optimize resources. Super Bowl LIX (that's 59 to those of who never mastered Roman numerals) is set for this evening, featuring the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles. Did you know there's a group of friends who have [attended every Super Bowl in person](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpCAUhX8Ndhi84KAFxTZ2s-2W5jpclB0EA-yY-fcbJ696yetOvnw5OTl_7vMdffBx_Y07merSDAJ6LoCLcbbow3tWjTWOCEg2ZDotRzEOQ6-azcBoQTjs3XLTwhEsDoYbCSkH3T-s1o03V5sAMXadED20SslFWqk1YWeVdkwJsr6m3P5NPtaNXHinF-X2kfYmmK3WozD5i8HEYDrPs820-hQx7GQ9RjrLZTKYypFyLfwiDKaI9WPxb9gFXv4dlPmSzq_oMBa-Yt0ocx8vk6cc6KI18SfRwfuRvwkzLzUTPpts7HH6EHy5aabEuqMPn731p_9eBv4HAAD__5S4dnM)? We're sponsored today by [GoldCo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kT3PnDAMgH9N2HJynEDIkKESx_ZWeqVKVScUiANpA5wgHL1_X9GPoarq0X782JY_v3VvLqa4jB_dTDaHtUPAkgNyMJ13Mb06VXgbiJBkQVZoacDUdamKyeoaldAGQRnotRIYBjDaBUWo-gC6iPayAYIRAqDEm1Kyl15qTU54pQNTQD7mdbt9XeOSJwrptT5puw3rXCQ75fzYmfzAsGXYnud5G9fk95ietH2LmdPsYrpYhm2fDuJghEF14bLdwxA9k40G8T7BFe_3-5fvDKu0M9kACH6_-vmniXj7ay7DaliYbOqy5JUpuTIIDKsjz92-HttATDZ_41dpJh-Pmcnmp-93cnDzw8Vx-XeDYrP-ccaU4l5ppmD8c0WR__eBp8UfAQAA__91jYHh), offering a free investment guide to buying Gold and Silver.

## Chiefs Aiming for Super Bowl Dynasty
The Kansas City Chiefs will try to become the first team to [win the Super Bowl three straight seasons](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvTk67s4QDwxdsqVrRwvDEVORYGGaKP--cveOnz7pPel9XeerSzk9bp_uLrbFMiPgOAAOMM3BpfyeuQ82iqBQL1YZmmA6n0fuV-vPoEUTEropSFhIaUdePDChG1n3yR40QJiUAhjxxEwLBTJGnApsYscgIbVST98lPdoqMb_LU-rJl3uf7dratnf00eGlw4vbHvLaj-sYtSWfpcPL_rNJHZbyykNbq8gmrg1R-8WMi1LiyajoWfvAIOyDM8ag9NWG7ZVyTrs2HcPt7lL-s7b_Kjwt_gYAAP__UgtdhA) today when they face the Philadelphia Eagles at Caesars Superdome in New Orleans. Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes has won the Super Bowl MVP three times, including a 38-35 win against the Eagles in 2023. [The Eagles will try to put a stop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQAL8GukVmMRgKF6-hu9emRAav8SY-jLDvnPv76NKnHmlGmo_bcjMc-Nj_mzvp7OKCAnsQCGJarOHwWmRttSNC6mrSreomMY1jL2uv7TT0o7Sr6Nd1UqodZW_UoJAQB7FuWLN-2wSKqW2F6LGRsls72ylFprVSuUoKspzj1XxGPrInF17xSVezxXsdtM_5TFX3r8K5wrmU0hwuvFmF80ElVTinx0kXrLEECPwNLj4uyJ6PPUGOUEzePLh4AR_wZY5kEmycX7B5Jpfg9ByMpXB6NkBmD5TqS9uzcAicBlVJsd8N_zbr_Nefp8afAAAA__8lsWmL) to the dynasty talk with running back Saquon Barkley and a strong offensive line that will complement the combination of quarterback Jalen Hurts and wide receiver A.J. Brown. Among those attending the game will be the [“Never Miss A Super Bowl Club,”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvpCAUhX8Ndhi84KAFxTZ2s-2W5jpclB0EA-yY-fcbJ696yetOvnw5OTl_7vMdffBx_Y07merSDAJ6LoCLcbbow3tWjTWOCEg2ZDotRzEOQ6-azcBoQTjs3XLTwhEsDoYbCSkH3T-s1o03V5sAMXadED20SslFWqk1YWeVdkwJsr6m3P5NPtaNXHinF-X2kfYmmK3WozD5i8HEYDrPs820-hQx7GQ9RjrLZTKYypFyLfwiDKaI9WPxb9gFXv4dlPmSzq_oMBa-Yt0ocx8vk6cc6KI18SfRwfuRvwkzLzUTPpts7HH6EHy5aabEuqMPn731p_9eBv4HAAD__5S4dnM) three men in their 80s who have attended each of the previous 58 games, including the first title game when tickets were $12.
## Flu Levels at a 16-Year High
Levels of influenza are [at their highest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuxCAQRL8Gd1jrBQ5TUKRxd2lTWhwsZyJsLEPOur-PnD7dSKOZJ72v-3x3Kaft-elWsi2WGQEVB-Rg5uBSfs-yCzYSIYmO7KCFATOOSnaL9XCLo1PoDGgJiEpjDEoM6uYUjYPpkr3eAMEMA4DCXkrxEEFoTW4IUkcmgUJq5ei_S9raQjG_y4uO3pe1y3Zpba9MfDCcGE7nefb-UTc669UznK7IcIr5h2d6Ua58Sc-FauM1bZ44Ahi-uy3Qmjz3wfOD9nK0a9QdNuxnyjnVm2YSnqtL-Y_b_vPwsvgbAAD__-Y-Xxk) nationwide since the peak of the 2009 season, according to a new report. Many of the new cases involve patients who are [experiencing common complications](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfgzcseOAYBoYu3tK1o0XgObyKQGRorPTXV-nQrdtJn3Q63cd5PXvKVK7v_oaub3UFARMXwIVdo6f8XPUQ3YYIqAZ0clZWWGMmPSQXUZmAwSg_GS0mC9ZsUUVAUNacpBnIvdoECCulEBOMWquLimqe0cuo541pgZF63cfPSqUn3PKzPnAfQ70N2aXe742pNwYLg-U4jrFcQsGjvZzBktDnnv4CfxGDZctfPPiGjSe6Jh5i4JRzwdZ4qu1O3Wf69p1qaXwPxUsrQahhd_F-UM7UTjPT4nrzlH-H9P-OeTj4CQAA__89j2Yn) after being sick with the flu several weeks ago. Up to a third of hospitalized flu patients develop bacterial pneumonia within a few weeks of their acute illness. This year, there have been [at least 24 million flu illnesses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6jAQRp8m6YImE_8WLm5Dx223jCaZMXhlYhQbEG-_yvZbfvqkc6TzdZkvlHLarv_pLqHFMiOgHgAH8DNTyp9Z9RyiCMrUSxjt5ME7p1V_Cx4EjXagSa3GMlh2ZvSiYWEtgrZP4aABgh9HAI0npaZl4slaoZGVjZ0C4dTKfvouaWs3iflTXrKf1nLvc7i19qjd9K_Dc4dnemzyrsd1jL2lNUuH52cdYn4OVaiWbVh5HcgoEBcFlhhJkYtm4YWtkBNtwFG_B368U86pGtspuN4p5V9l-yvBK-BPAAAA___kF1w_), 310,000 hospitalizations, and 13,000 deaths—including at least 57 children. Traditionally, flu season peaks around February. Other viral infections such as [COVID-19 and RSV](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FyhCAQANCvge6cZQGVgiKN3aVN6ZBjOTeDh4NEx7_PJH1-4M28j_t8D5z59XwPK_mWyoyA9gZ4AzfHwPmajYw-ESFpSV4N2oEbR2vk4kPvYgz9qKNK1rreASqDNowpGQOEkv2vBghOKQCLnTH6U0c9DBRUNEMSBihyK7X7KvxqC6V8lYNq9yirzH5pbduFfhM4CZzO8-we8dE9yyFwqrRvXEMr9bodXL932gVOMbQgcJLVx-3knHnvB2HguQbOf2j7L3l4_AkAAP__zUJTUg) have been fading nationally, according to hospital data and to CDC modeling projections.
## Judge Temporarily Halts USAID Plan
A federal judge [ordered a temporary halt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOqJlvWBcuPibdPnbK5GN18meDEbGSZS3P3H9dTMaaT7p-7rNNydJtvt_t7KtMc8IOHSAHZg5OEmfmdpgIzOyatn2Whkw0zRQ-7ARAfuAXqEmM5oFlsnzOLjBjT6qSK3Y8w0QTN8DDHghUl4FpTW7PpCODQEHqblcvrNs9cExffKLy2XJa5vso9b9aNS_Bq8NXt2-8fs4p7OUKkviBq_Pw0noYi4s9607cy3Pde_K00vuaIoTjTABBaV8cK6fgtbjsJBHiobbYsP-lpTkGHVDcF-dpF98_UvHy-JPAAAA__-cwWAY) on Friday to President Trump’s plan to place 2,200 workers at the U.S. Agency for International Development on administrative leave. U.S. District Judge Carl Nichols, a Trump appointee, also blocked [an order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQAL8Gd1h4IcYUFK9xl9deaWGzOJtgYwGJL39_yvVXjzQjzdd1ujqKtK__3Ya2hjSBgAsXwIWZvKP4nlTjbUAElA3aTksjzDBcVHOz2vS6D53XMMjQg-uhR-WkCbMy8zBDQ_ZjEyBM1wlxgVYpOUsvtUbXeaUDUwI91ZTbe6K93jDEd3phbpe0NdHeaj0Kk_8YjAzG8zzbkL53PMuHMxiPFKnSUhiM96dfkc8xLY_Ca35uBw85bfyIbqF95QBC8Gdx5PmZ8gNz4RHdC5ts_XFSjFR6zZRYN0fxN1__2vGy8BMAAP__WPRjFQ) that would have given 30 days for the thousands of overseas USAID workers to move their families back to the U.S. at the government's expense. The ruling grants the American Foreign Service Association and American Federation of Government Employees [a reprieve until Feb. 14](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO6yAQhp8GOiKuwS4oTuMup93SImaIZ4WNBeOs8varpN_6v3zS93WbbxEL7o__cYNAuc5aaiekFnKcU8Tymi1PIQNoMByC8maU4zA4y9dwvS_KyNGAc36R2Y7e5mEYrFPZZbCeY3i_SS1HpaR0-mKtuZtkvIeokvWZWQkJqbbLd8WdVsjlVZ_QLkvdeAkr0dGZ-cf0xPREK6xYyjtjemrwOEskrDvT01LPRuIeiQp0pienjPFWCmrndoiYNtyxU_vUBcF21BYblpc44tmhi7NHTGI56T3mLaTjB0vBfvXMyscW8UPl9JehZ9C_AQAA___Df2mJ) at midnight. The judge also ruled that 500 USAID employees currently on administrative leave must be reinstated until that date and restored “complete access” to email, payment, and security notification systems. The agency was created in 1961 and codified by Congress in 1998.

The answer might lie in a [remarkable antioxidant](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kEFr8zAMQH-Nc0uQJTuuDz58EHL56C4d7BiUWmk83CakXkf__UjZdReBeA_x0MdxOHLK6XZ546uEMi0DAtoasAY_RE75OZgqhkkEhSoJ2pEHfzhYU83Bo_YwsmeLfmTjLB9IcBKOrdMsukphvwYIXmsAi40xNFIk54R1NG5SBiSmsmzN55JuZZYpP5eHbM15uVY5zKWsd0X_FPYK-2lsblzSQ1Yu824o7Le4j2adV0X9PUVFnbatVtiuX6OiDg1YRwrbs96335r6vT-dag0AO0FF3f-XQ4q6HVVbiOt3yjndW6cMXK6c8qup_PWjR8CfAAAA__-CtGCO) that most people have never heard of. Flu Levels at a 16-Year High Levels of influenza are nationwide since the peak of the 2009 season, according to a new report. Many of the new cases involve patients who are after being sick with the flu several weeks ago. Up to a third of hospitalized flu patients develop bacterial pneumonia within a few weeks of their acute illness. This year, there have been , 310,000 hospitalizations, and 13,000 deaths—including at least 57 children. Traditionally, flu season peaks around February. Other viral infections such as have been fading nationally, according to hospital data and to CDC modeling projections. Judge Temporarily Halts USAID Plan A federal judge on Friday to President Trump’s plan to place 2,200 workers at the U.S. Agency for International Development on administrative leave. U.S. District Judge Carl Nichols, a Trump appointee, also blocked that would have given 30 days for the thousands of overseas USAID workers to move their families back to the U.S. at the government's expense. The ruling grants the American Foreign Service Association and American Federation of Government Employees at midnight. The judge also ruled that 500 USAID employees currently on administrative leave must be reinstated until that date and restored “complete access” to email, payment, and security notification systems. The agency was created in 1961 and codified by Congress in 1998. subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01VFiEyVph-KHwFzNIBLMw~~/AARclBA~/LAqeXnM6_ZPAQJ6_BeXl6fgkY-DKDRh4RSry_AJW0-T-c9_2u4xV4pM1pw8NOZVZq6rq0bY9pXSB63saBe7mYget1GPYonneJzCb1M8tt7obkBP8EThdPCQ2Yo3XpzunaGeaB3SUszhbBMq06uDuuONdwPBYsvaxubY9G3py3_vP4hKJM-MelN6aIiR2-dd2yuYIc5N6vxigL6VuXA9Ac3KQq7DeS-YcKUUgcqN6joRJUym1zl9z4rPNKIkR7Xp2cqLci-V-yJd31coMB24MpG-X4_-7rFz6jRekSiu0iEPlyoRm5ia0OxzVzomIabXH)

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01VFiEyVph-KHwFzNIBLMw~~/AARclBA~/LAqeXnM6_ZPAQJ6_BeXl6fgkY-DKDRh4RSry_AJW0-T-c9_2u4xV4pM1pw8NOZVZq6rq0bY9pXSB63saBe7mYget1GPYonneJzCb1M8tt7obkBP8EThdPCQ2Yo3XpzunaGeaB3SUszhbBMq06uDuuONdwPBYsvaxubY9G3py3_vP4hKJM-MelN6aIiR2-dd2yuYIc5N6vxigL6VuXA9Ac3KQq7DeS-YcKUUgcqN6joRJUym1zl9z4rPNKIkR7Xp2cqLci-V-yJd31coMB24MpG-X4_-7rFz6jRekSiu0iEPlyoRm5ia0OxzVzomIabXH) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01VFiEyVph-KHwFzNIBLMw~~/AARclBA~/LAqeXnM6_ZPAQJ6_BeXl6fgkY-DKDRh4RSry_AJW0-T-c9_2u4xV4pM1pw8NOZVZq6rq0bY9pXSB63saBe7mYget1GPYonneJzCb1M8tt7obkBP8EThdPCQ2Yo3XpzunaGeaB3SUszhbBMq06uDuuONdwPBYsvaxubY9G3py3_vP4hKJM-MelN6aIiR2-dd2yuYIc5N6vxigL6VuXA9Ac3KQq7DeS-YcKUUgcqN6joRJUym1zl9z4rPNKIkR7Xp2cqLci-V-yJd31coMB24MpG-X4_-7rFz6jRekSiu0iEPlyoRm5ia0OxzVzomIabXH)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Restore Our Nation

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/mHXp9Fgc5vsOpT3u3PFWExvLRh4zmGEakL-FfAGppuKIPms_wy9KAmYZXk9GGpyUejCILteRyIZKNMeOIwznyJ7c9I4PwTuU3I-ULthCT9krCSIvDeLy0gCRQplhE9iNh7H75Mr8slV70roTV9vb3-4ihHLHodClKNuKZKH4E9yBrsfQpFqFXfx4ediZCGmoUGrrtm9A_NzgDlX7xMAX30VLOlYK40GFw4HPTcCPEEtJmzqCNenbtr70SX16F7OYv5sq2koJg1RQZaVGtz9LHQilcwVcMgU-PzxkcodY9YXU6Rzdp6hp-uKqeuCqu8qxMgRs3BIC6Aqh9b7kws5DvrP53iNTn1fV8DT4HTGzKDMjAyi1D0zTXJWEAqNRuSw-PHKYeny6w-RTCTFSSphnIjAxF2poGvjUtaMyCrZv_kWO7Vxbw5Gee9ax-5mW11Y8tG9WDi4EO1a_RqxJk23ZtqjTs8xNJaKbT0O7Jk7boZA/_eq7mkVEbDTxW4xLnu4rFqizj_BohuB_/5)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/5V7RijoFkhcmSLVQCY35JwaygUMYKTh3JZrFL-O7i94n6kbsYrifeEgyIsw7sIVL7mOqy0fgSS90YeEIBviXTsuY6-PfJPHjwrb5JzBhwY2gW3ka-oMCJmchAL9lakomZHtKY_z_yGXxVOmsiLHc5H1VKzY_-LL5tnct8u0w9cFLe-PkOa3Melhgsp2l7XWj26OIQOzutknzOA8pnbUBj2NaanpMImjL_ZfpL4nQv_kxmiGi19jogpk4BqyoaG3ckHDXptGK7ThagyTUp4mCe4gE7IVykXMJCISws-D7LUxg56_WmxQwB0jFcguFoU6mjgsY-t_EbLhQnfprvCq4O7Se8Vv72tajNHJNDNl4Kd2brOPpWhGRXlC4IEha5WcCY1DpdvFsHUGAgJQdoBKwacZzFjETrKi270cZOrIRsy_lBGSny354pKO4XhG6mBYJ3hbPpAbVQhVIiafy-FwhY-B6ObNWatIyJ_ocNHMXwec/szeV0GiAPehtREIQKm9iRyijs0OuKVfD/5)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/VG5w82u8MhMrDj93C9yDFzlx8Gs1SIQvF40QfNpMEWWvU4aWKDyRGnQ3cGRL9jfyhS4EoKh2Ip7TDBoEdyGi5ooHlmZ0uG3vfyHe0758PNC-ti3n12BOz744hHokK-lBahYn5eVHIqCGGVDeWCvu1J0BS87cMRse7GlyKZpW2_gsGkC8-wC8c66FmTmQtaX7QhB6DfyN0vZL-JR3k8K4qvqdJcdxcUHxs2ZAd89r7mA_IBlfkUQO3n4y9JTXOp0ue4ntgTVHpqfcrqrn14llmLJRjqWU8d1cKcSNQJp1f9F49mNgRB7X8EEx-dFbYrNg2QxrMRlCKpSPYtkueXQ6hiRdYSHTCWWFq2uRtW4HV-bQOdZYKZv3e-ERRXMP26xXTjed251q7X4rvqEuMGqyO0iesvuF2Q2nixVK5HvX9BHDBkTVjttmV1W0fxQHQvEFTAjrCZitZDgsJ-yLHpDcfwRSOUqWuk1jEfoeII0AJTQ/AgU-zs4pgXaFRUQPrxh7YEibz_eonPZM/5)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Full Mag News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/u/ffmd86Mg-e8PQ66gfgyCj0Yi6twcdaQEx06iJdu9g-1pgDq3zfeAscfb81MdGd6Nhb3wXB4XH7spB1DLqaEQfC0QAtW59n4oFgsOpz3-ydM12uaWAJ0CqxOn30DASbR9yfGG6Sko06uY_t9gkN5NBDD4urQEqd6YdWAE_Z0p_VZzLQ5BAR8SKEwVeQU8FsUjVgfLTt3nqdI2c_1jjqrl3CvBbQji8rODnQ/gmuXDXcWH8ePcRtjlZohEd2pSGmXqX8F/5)

subject: WARNING ⚠️: NEW SilverBack OTF Knife is for Responsible Adults Only!

subject: Claim your Hillsdale College Calendar

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8b7f5a5171d641afa9c7792a8b1325f2&_e=_bzHflQXQGf06uVvpMDbPb0CtdTMo_W3V-5VBaugIu-JgRIVptsE4x4rUG9Srtpbm9Z-_1ZmCuB14qGhnEUJaWM-yHsG-_qKmK9YeMDrWFYZxJ3sOR1CNH1-R7PucOlx_ItnxHXaZNGMt27FXNFCWCT3DIyWbxKnan6paQvEuWj-coTghxCt99KZWr-XHboDh0yKPA_aanG9h5J0BAZhz-wNbI1vXZcsCeWv6pa3QYtmNVN0u7s2K3DWv1lltiJM8lRIxCNkVyVnTA-qYgos_xPKpxxQ99xcZYwXHazTYyRx1EYQpM7EwKMjGYHlixF2cuRQqLRVR7TTplrNDUlY64t1NiQN_ml8paNAu6c749ZOrroDUU_NJari6IJoFSDzmJQvEbXVOq-Al5rdWPL6yg%3D%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/o60hbUCwc22U6SDH3OgT7h30aAfGwV6eNniUSWkB5YggCdv2r91xXLozZ3e4AehnfCC-yHrvI0WJxngp-u2X5PTAr45dNKIi2yVmxY80lO29PGZcHdCFH6dSLe-RkOnsHdByLsZeX3kCHrTN_nYSVYtiHy2ijs_lKIaDEfmJqSueZEKKT5VX4DHo-UF-dGdUa1L7GB1YKYPrC7iuICZ46yLWxsqqIWnY6xXzcj540zV_UCtkwadxwtCrrVatrHAPRgopzi412_IAvpE5kwUnxuArtwk6f0i23NzpBDOJADHNlhwjvF3BSTxmmRTGJUYdhGqETrLcCces27PrR44JGqMWJPPHbVZ6RdJ2WNWHeRnUCfxSfBzYKDG3d41HxR7MVynAFnkL5jPF6TPqeOA8qXdGqiHbJH7ImuCTrmgwYE2fDrDuieWeat4i5RPyx7AC6MKrvkycF3J3vMaFKry_AQyCzWaNcEy8M9dZoqRtNTk/2yq59Gz6P_O1EwI-zV2ZZF1IHkVRtSsO/5)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/Ss1adupI_sRvLD8Nh-y117yWg63nRIMGyNZf7B2EefLU8FW41tMnxIH2Aep-1d89MNdtW7r9LxxoemyfwXuUeserwxkeGk6bIZ4ptzaI9Llebwdp1Cp0PgAHpfZMH2aTQYYZoHFts06_5Bg5lB50wSYKGxCql_0RUi_L4poVGtxjkU-vp6z3udfsU5xZye-Zeqh_oT-1pv5qH-IcTp4BGo4ljCFQDGKLoK9Ic77Bl-JEaafwHQcXCiJNVOxBCZg12k9crtfSnEVfrQi6eRVZA6RIEa2wQl_aoJaMn3Z6TivCeX-W7u7_DRmE8AyJa97mIM-lkvYTRTAUVuFraBR_Gya026QrsBj2BMhRR6Pl1-7uL8NVUWmAsVLANUci1TV_5UaZvrswThBhRVgwr8BmszdRyN6dAFC24-lOFLdpDe3g_UQ2yyDX5C5QRQhAW5-GEvrO-gEj7ndA0zggtxVyd6fdKKU_IjoPnpxij06Kwzw/bfuqBP2bGAJsX7m9mvb2a_Imiwb4CAof/5)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/EZXK-fuCClNjyxaB9bYrSa07nbTr3bO4IbbjMGeMOqJL_jQnbWE5CKTkep1sU1yChBAh8EfX7O_YLBWtlr5SIj6rJHUJ8fgpJd606i-J-gOmwP8Qm5MHM-GYfxqm5SLTOuM-aD-qInNFf2dcrteWPi_GEed9GRs8HbSNP3wplSoQrzW09LNLHrcnNFaG_jZadOaGPHgGZm6OK4m1Us2fQsu5pBcx30ZCCQU_Z2hSpCBqsF8Wi5HMpx_uKXeRV_1vgLXPycG2IJbPnRhiRaY1D8ZWcu-t3NFwCTehi5k-axUgNtS_cQfVs2yDMekV_qKezEbRMK1U6wTqlxkq5Kwym9fpiBFgJ2ULm_tpMTtAqON8PIGu7f9gehsFbBAUJ1eHaZGQLehy1wYTUw2Fn5tw6GVnYvfn6saxHarovZBeabCgxx5pMCEYeeINtopEHOTNRmJNoK1FqGZvkbrGh1s_Aj9E61pAox9DFS6EULF6XSg/YSafZUpQGGsiSt2aV1WO49v3t1wALSHo/5)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/u/w9ah574u1F5YR9fbxB5Zs-GLAstwLn1mH8P5AzSQxg9tpl9v8zM4awoiyEwgxtoeSrMyXTKdo2QbcVsgCZnArD4-BSy2SscAKybL_5YBZ0CmTIGSbvMuPMR4srSBIXrwysawi-Xe2DUj0YNFDi9OC2KvKe3YYPrmff1GI5aYh1yQVQ3e6pb-KMdsaWEE-9GfvSZHUiFtUA-QzWgzCbcziDh_rlB2FiKYaw/Xq2SCSvRXqz7E669kPybeE7cfXnGR3YN/5)

**Donald J. Trump's Victory is officially certified and America's 47th President - secured his triumphant return!**

name: Scott Presler
subject: All eyes are on the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
This is an open letter to America First patriots.

| | | | |
---
Friend, I’m bringing Republican Senators an urgent message:
#

# **__RFK Jr__**** _.,_****__Tulsi Gabbard__**** _, and_**** __Kash Patel__**** _must be confirmed._**
#
**_And our team will do whatever is necessary to hold GOP Senators accountable who don’t vote YES on their confirmations._**
#

# This is not a threat... It's a peaceful promise.
#

# We must hold our senators accountable and let them know that the Republican voters who got them into office demand that they confirm President Trump’s Cabinet nominees.

[HELP CONFIRM TRUMP’S CABINET](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y2y/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
# We, the grassroots, are watching closely.
#

# That’s why I’m not just sending this message to the Senators considering voting down President Trump’s cabinet appointees.
#

# I am sending this message to you and countless other American patriots just like you who helped us get President Trump over the line in November.
#

# **_We are holding our Republican Senators’ feet to the fire, and we are making sure they know that the voice of the people will be heard._**

[PUT GOP SENATORS ON NOTICE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y2y/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
# I have made my intentions clear, friend.

# When we sent President Trump to the White House, we did so believing that President Trump would staff the federal government with allies who will help him Make America Great Again.

# Any Republican Senator standing in the way of President Trump’s cabinet appointees must not be let off the hook by the voters who made their voices loud and clear on Election Day...

** _If they vote no, they must be primaried out of the Senate._**

[PUT GOP SENATORS ON NOTICE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y2y/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
# Senators, for decades, have _**voted against**_ the will of the American people, and faced **_zero accountability_** for it.
#

# If we want to truly Make America Great Again then this time things must be different.
#

# Accountability is coming to Washington whether the political establishment likes it or not.
#

# That’s why I’m asking for your help right now.
#

# **__[Please chip in whatever you can today to help us hold our ground and fuel our ability to keep the pressure on Republican Senators to support President Trump’s cabinet nominees](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y2y/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__**** _._**
#

# I am counting on you to help us win this crucial fight, we have come too far to let our movement be stopped by the Swamp.

_To Victory,_

**Scott Presler** Founder, Early Vote Action

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y2y/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NTk1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
|

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/jmgnFKaWC0IrnqnV0SR0mKMgRhOppdHN27iSPweNi7WMwtI5f8Qx9IdHBfl-rlks9QbkBL5IQ3MsTG4WJGRQud5kqK1QrCR7mz2cBh1rt2boOz3q9eVqddFTsQwHjYIaN7EYlBrScV6WFDGaptfMn0RwZmUlZp3lRRFW7MYP_PFal4p-5pcauVYHQ-qHRpPDS32-JPebqssHplZNAKxw3PXyUVgiLLqX6HRrvgbQm-BxBQDcmqtvEb6LMrft3v3AndKzboKg_z4FpCfXSy1rw72n92iek9Co11JUvlnl_Yn5M27HbHFY9V6QM5Fi9IQ7NA5eaGYQ_oAmbZ6oHiKU2Fb-z8HQM_uSONT61TE4MpgYVdUL2eFhxCyg4RF4Vcyug_5HnWRAG0jikYjN6kPjQg_WXl7jym4BeqGzPvFtBoPtDhttlk5B3ufdPvqSRVu-napmGJ0_/e79BvK51DGFNwFNkMPpH9kmsLvIY_tbB/5)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Friend —
Last week's announcement by President Trump of plans to forcibly relocate all the citizens of the Gaza Strip have understandably set the world on fire. Speculation and hysteria is running rampant as people attempt to guess Trump's real motives.
If he follows through on his stated intention, this would quickly become one of the greatest tragedies in recent memory, and would be an eternal stain on the reputation of the United States. However, others insist that Trump is only using this as a "negotiating tactic," and not to take it too seriously.
Rather than engaging in Trump-tea-leaf reading, The LaRouche Organization is taking a different approach: Organize! Don't get caught wondering and speculating. Instead, recognize that we are in a historic moment of change and act accordingly.
Lyndon LaRouche proposed an [Oasis Plan for Israel-Palestine](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNGkyf-6bftPvBP4skQiOHZyiq_-5S0ZdXIyx-ovaHeFw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250209_newsletter&n=3) 50 years ago—in 1975—a proposal which remains the only valid solution to this region today. LaRouche made the proposal in order to upgrade the normally stale discussion of "peace talks" and "political solutions," introducing the element of physical-economic transformation to stabilize the process. The Oasis Plan, along with a two-state solution, must become reality if peace will ever come to this region.
So join us in organizing! Aside from the turmoil of the past 20 days, the world is still in the process of rejecting a unipolar order, and replacing it instead with a more just one. As Vladimir Putin said: the world is becoming more "polyphonic" not polycentric. So join the singing and participate!
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! — LaRouche: "The End of Sykes-Picot: Moving Beyond Colonialism"
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48POYTl5i363tibtADsoz7J9JjeooNNxvhKgP3fqhbGw5RScLyh6hNc98bQRvx0Qhnaw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250209_newsletter&n=4)
In May of 2009, Lyndon LaRouche was invited to speak at Central Connecticut State University lecture series sponsored by the late anti-Zionist Jewish activist and scholar Norton Mezvinsky. LaRouche's lecture, titled "The End of Sykes-Picot: Moving Beyond Colonialism," was delivered before an audience of approximately 200 faculty, students, and guests.
In this speech, LaRouche discussed how one must come to understand the area called the "Middle East" if one wishes to stop the perpetual conflicts there. Creating "peace in the Middle East" can never be some simple "local" solution, but must be considered as part of a strategy to end the entire dying colonial system globally.
Will the United States return to her own pro-growth, anti-colonial tradition and now finally, after a half a century, adopt LaRouche's policy? As recent history has shown, any other pragmatic, so-called "solutions" within the legacy geopolitical framework will continue to fail miserably.
[**Watch here - live at 10am**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48POYTl5i363tibtADsoz7J9IrWUQo1GaWKvQ4b33a8Yo1&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250209_newsletter&n=5)

Everyone is speculating on whether President Trump intended to make such an absurd proposal as the United States taking over Gaza and expelling all the Palestinians seriously, or as a bargaining point. Either way, it will never work that way, and to even express such a thing exposes a disturbing lack of understanding of the regional dynamic, and a lack of recognition that millions of Americans voted for Trump because they hoped he would end the genocide which the Biden/Harris team had been supporting, while claiming that they were "working on stopping it."
50 years ago, Lyndon LaRouche put forward a proposal for a two-state solution based on addressing the real crisis of the entire region: the lack of water. This week's Friday Symposium featured a lively discussion on this topic between LaRouche Organization President Diane Sare, Jason Ross of LaRouche's Science Team, and Hussein Askary of the Schiller Institute and the Swedish Belt and Road Institute.

name: History Facts
subject: Who refused the Nobel Peace Prize?
body:
The Nobel Peace Prize is among the most prestigious honors in the world, but not everyone considered for the prize has wanted it. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68do15368603na4z2ky2yp98fajj5xqj5y5rwyjg35dxoy6xiq4ao2447g193yvffwi2q77kmpwkhe6ro1186u02s2l8d3l8zh9bpgxoug4w0lfpzmb4e81eyuuni5euhnlkh01blh6019bb4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Queen Elizabeth II reportedly refused a nomination for the Nobel Peace Prize.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Nobel Peace Prize is among the most prestigious honors in the world, but not everyone considered for the prize has wanted it. Buckingham Palace was approached on more than one occasion about nominating [Queen Elizabeth II](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for the prize — including as recently as 2018 — but the idea was always politely rebuffed. Though the queen never provided an on-the-record explanation as to why, a line from [a speech](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) she gave on her 21st birthday has been pointed to as a possible motivation: “I declare before you all that my whole life, whether it be long or short, shall be devoted to your service.” In other words, she didn’t think it necessary to receive an award for fulfilling her stated duty.
---
Queen Elizabeth wasn’t the only person to turn down a Nobel Peace Prize nomination. Vietnamese politician Lê Đức Thọ did so in 1973 because it was to be a joint honor shared with U.S. Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Thọ and Kissinger had negotiated a ceasefire during the Vietnam War, and Thọ believed the U.S. had violated the term’s agreements. The decision to award Kissinger was so controversial that two members of the Norwegian Nobel Committee resigned in protest, while _The New York Times_ referred to the award as the [“Nobel War Prize.”](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Nobel Prizes are not given posthumously.
Any chance of Queen Elizabeth II finally receiving the Nobel Peace Prize ended with her death in 2022, as the Nobel Committee [does not give out](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srf0db&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) posthumous awards. There have been a few exceptions, however, some of which weren’t intentional. Ralph M. Steinman was announced as having won the Nobel Prize in physiology or medicine on October 3, 2011, but died on September 30 without the committee realizing it. He received the prize anyway. Prior to 1974, the official rule was that an honoree could win posthumously as long as they had been nominated before February 1 of the same year, as was the case for 1931 literature winner Erik Axel Karlfeldt and 1961 Peace Prize honoree Dag Hammarskjöld.

clean_body: The Nobel Peace Prize is among the most prestigious honors in the world, but not everyone considered for the prize has wanted it. | T he Nobel Peace Prize is among the most prestigious honors in the world, but not everyone considered for the prize has wanted it. Buckingham Palace was approached on more than one occasion about nominating for the prize — including as recently as 2018 — but the idea was always politely rebuffed. Though the queen never provided an on-the-record explanation as to why, a line from she gave on her 21st birthday has been pointed to as a possible motivation: “I declare before you all that my whole life, whether it be long or short, shall be devoted to your service.” In other words, she didn’t think it necessary to receive an award for fulfilling her stated duty. Queen Elizabeth wasn’t the only person to turn down a Nobel Peace Prize nomination. Vietnamese politician Lê Đức Thọ did so in 1973 because it was to be a joint honor shared with U.S. Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Thọ and Kissinger had negotiated a ceasefire during the Vietnam War, and Thọ believed the U.S. had violated the term’s agreements. The decision to award Kissinger was so controversial that two members of the Norwegian Nobel Committee resigned in protest, while The New York Times referred to the award as the | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Nobel Peace Prize laureates 142 | | Years Elizabeth II served as queen, the longest reign of any British monarch 70 | Years Elizabeth II served as queen, the longest reign of any British monarch 70 | | Times the International Committee of the Red Cross has received the Nobel Peace Prize 3 | | Monarchs of England and Britain ~63 | Monarchs of England and Britain ~63 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Nobel Prizes are not given posthumously. Any chance of Queen Elizabeth II finally receiving the Nobel Peace Prize ended with her death in 2022, as the Nobel Committee posthumous awards. There have been a few exceptions, however, some of which weren’t intentional. Ralph M. Steinman was announced as having won the Nobel Prize in physiology or medicine on October 3, 2011, but died on September 30 without the committee realizing it. He received the prize anyway. Prior to 1974, the official rule was that an honoree could win posthumously as long as they had been nominated before February 1 of the same year, as was the case for 1931 literature winner Erik Axel Karlfeldt and 1961 Peace Prize honoree Dag Hammarskjöld. body:
#################################

Friend,

**[BIG NEWS:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/txz0_c2eAD3BWb8OvcZx1w~~/AARclBA~/arNLPTLc3wJ6vq23li0sZYzhoaZST3HmwU7FmQswVlD5B9dCRVAWAzSE8bKMCyEk_PmwtgpTssGeGoUk6Ym3Zs10kSyI5Sxd-7WyRGjUAyb3Z8Ty7EH28NCAd-Zdv475Li1fNL6yufZzdLtLE-qOvWcAIINPBHqooGLk2X5t1XJzhLCEyS0kcU5eEO1biClGwpQ4lRvucVqbI6fkUZ6lrPVSwV1NMNvXF1W2sLmG4gGye7nDqxPIq-VCsJKTeo3HLZ2CyOZKn-6lFsqjXzj1ci_7dTNrQ17npcFHOhsSS52KOdMY6-HxTdG1UyzwBjF9_sB_dwZnxDVdp7bD27FflQP67cv-kLS7O38Nfa6fmskv4bUuEMotkxCDn5rWXDRRJqrbTVudW2jUwX3DqVShcQ~~) **Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But here's the thing...

_... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025._

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: 2026: A defining moment for Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)

Friend --
2026 will be a monumental year in Michigan.
Our senior senator, Gary Peters, announced recently that he won’t seek re-election. And our Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, has served a maximum of 2 terms.
To put a finer point on it, 2026 will be the first time in 110 years that Michigan has open races for both governor and U.S. Senate at the same time.
Those two races alone would make 2026 a high-stakes year – BUT THAT’S JUST THE START.
Michigan will also have an open seat race for Secretary of State and Attorney General. We’ll have a handful of highly-competitive U.S. Senate races. And our entire state House and Senate are on the ballot, both with razor-thin margins for control.
This is a real defining moment for Michigan, where we’ll select the next generation of leaders for our state.
It also – amazingly – means that when all is said and done after the next elections, I’ll be the senior-most statewide elected official in Michigan.
That’s why even though I’m not on the ballot in 2026, it’s an all-hands-on-deck moment, so I’ll be working as hard as ever, hitting the campaign trail to elect principled, pragmatic, capable leaders for our state.
That’s why I’m asking:
[**Could you use this link to make a contribution to my campaign today, to help me elect the next generation of leadership in Michigan?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb25.Q-wXFf&refcode=em250209&t=2&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $24](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb25.owYovg&amount=24&refcode=em250209&t=21&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $35](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2881?c0=ebs-em-feb25.14qI0H&refcode=em250209&t=22&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-feb25.32lMxb&refcode=em250209&t=23&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-feb25.t4HOSA&refcode=em250209&t=24&akid=2238%2E135344%2ESxYtB0)**

****
Thank you,
Elissa

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Exciting News on the Horizon - Stay Tuned!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=5f7564fbbd&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

I hope this note finds you well and that your 2025 is off to a great start.

I am honored to have recently been elected President of the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors.

As I reflect on my work serving San Mateo County, I am grateful for your continued support in helping me achieve so much for our community. Together, we’ve worked to address critical priorities like public safety, housing affordability, and ensuring equitable access to services for all.

While my current role has allowed me to make a meaningful impact, I know there is still more work to be done. As I look toward the future and the opportunities ahead, I would love to have your continued support. Your encouragement, ideas, and generosity have always been invaluable, and they will continue to help drive the success of my future endeavors.

** [David Canepa — Donate via ActBlue](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c5b3595ec4&e=c0babbc643)**

Thank you again for your partnership and for believing in my vision. I look forward to continuing to serve you and our community in the years ahead.

In friendship,

David Canepa
Board President, San Mateo County

P.S. Please expect a call from me soon so we can discuss your priorities for the new year and how I can best represent them.

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=0ae03efa8d&e=c0babbc643) **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
