name: Chris Deluzio
subject: this is a betrayal to veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101817385/527164781/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZiNDBmYi1lOWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOGAzqJ1u1QTLJWv-Ttaib5dSJ_uhdbVXMI1lkkCu-U=&emci=d750068d-72e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=91fb40fb-e9e6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894) Right now, some Congressional Republicans are trying to privatize the VA healthcare system that millions of my fellow veterans and I rely on.

**This is an unprecedented assault on the Department of Veterans Affairs’ healthcare system.** It isn’t reform: it’s demolition and privatization. And it is fiscally reckless. **[The VA is being hollowed out in favor of private profits, but I don’t think the VA should be for sale. I’m going to fight like hell to defend the benefits that I, and so many of my fellow veterans, earned, and I need you to stand with me in this fight. Sign my petition to Congress demanding they reject these bills and protect the VA →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101817388/527164784/1609978465?refcode=email_020925_va&source=email_020925_va&utm_campaign=email_020925_va&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZiNDBmYi1lOWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOGAzqJ1u1QTLJWv-Ttaib5dSJ_uhdbVXMI1lkkCu-U=&emci=d750068d-72e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=91fb40fb-e9e6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894)** | | [Sign the petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101817392/527164787/1609978465?refcode=email_020925_va&source=email_020925_va&utm_campaign=email_020925_va&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWZiNDBmYi1lOWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOGAzqJ1u1QTLJWv-Ttaib5dSJ_uhdbVXMI1lkkCu-U=&emci=d750068d-72e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=91fb40fb-e9e6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894)

The Republicans leading this attack are following the lead of a group called _Concerned Veterans for America_ — but don’t be fooled by the name. This is the billionaire Kochs’ outfit that has been plotting VA privatization for years.

They want to strip the VA of its core functions, and farm veterans out to lower-quality, more expensive, and less accountable private providers instead of investing in the VA.

This isn’t fiscal conservatism. It’s a deliberate choice to weaken and replace a valued public healthcare system with a more expensive and worse private alternative — and I’m up for the fight against this.

Selling off the VA betrays veterans who sacrificed for this nation. We didn’t serve only to come home and watch politicians dismantle the VA. We can’t let this attack slip by unnoticed. The time to speak up is now.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro sees shadow—2 more years of the same
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=94da5c11f0&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Shapiro saw his shadow — two more years of progressive politics!](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e1429a2a8d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
In Pennsylvania, the first week of February brings two rituals: Punxsutawney Phil “tells” us if spring or winter lies ahead, and the Governor presents his state budget plan.

Both “characters” told us to prepare for a long, cold winter. Worse, Governor Josh Shapiro’s proclamation isn’t just a fun custom — it’s a sad reality.

When Shapiro presented his state budget, we knew he also had two choices: either an “early spring” — focusing on commonsense, bipartisan policies to get meaningful “stuff” done — or a long, cold “winter” — another year of progressive bluster, a budget based on expensive, left-wing ideology, appeasing the loudest fringes, and partisan fighting with Republicans.

Well, Pennsylvania, prepare for a long, cold winter.

**Why It Matters**. Shapiro chose to see his shadow — another year, another missed opportunity. Like the fictional movie “Groundhog Day,” we will be forced to re-live 2023 and 2024: cold, bleak and far more painful than necessary. Unlike Phil, Shapiro actually does have power over his own words, the power to choose “spring” or “winter.” He let us down again.

Shapiro, who as a candidate and as our newly elected governor, told us that “[every child of God deserved a shot](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9b4e3bae46&e=b7b3eddce2)” and that parents should be able to choose a school that works for their children, said nothing about that subject again. No flowery rhetoric, no pledged funding, no proposed legislation. Worse, he wants to cut funding for cyber charter schools — schools that are actually growing in enrollment. (Maybe, that’s why his teachers union buddies lobbied him to cut those students’ funds.)

Promises made, promises broken.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4b74f15b85&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Local scientist and women’s advocate is a guest as Trump signs order outlawing boys in girls sports ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db9c8ca067&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Shannon Grady, a world class triathlete, sports scientist, and Delco native, advocated keeping boys and men out of girls and women’s sports long before it was the mainstream view. She appeared on a local TV program in [2021](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=523930f657&e=b7b3eddce2) and explained that Biden’s executive order was in direct conflict with Title IX.

“Anytime a male takes the place of a female, you are eliminating opportunities for a female, but in essence, you are actually changing the dynamics of the entire team and the teams you play against.”
Grady, a physiologist and the author of The Lactate Revolution, said there is a trickle-down effect on allowing boys in girls sports. “Both the team with the boy and the team playing against that team are adversely impacted.”

Grady continued to call out the Biden order as unconstitutional and unfair to women and girls. Her efforts paid off this week when she was invited to the White House by President Donald Trump to attend the signing of the “Keeping Men out of Women’s Sports” [executive order](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=26aa6aa3a3&e=b7b3eddce2).

**Why It Matters**. “With my action this afternoon,” the president said, “we are putting every school receiving taxpayer dollars on notice that if you let men take over women’s sports teams or invade your locker rooms, you will be investigated for violations of Title IX and risk your federal funding,” he said. “So this will effectively end the attack on female athletes at public K-12 schools and virtually all U.S. colleges and universities.”

Grady is thrilled with the order and potential consequences for schools that do not comply. She has witnessed first hand the detrimental effects of the prior president’s orders and looks forward to righting the ship.

**Quotable**. “It will be interesting to see what actions the Chester County school boards make regarding this executive action given their recent history of admitting abiding to federal guidelines especially when it comes to Title IX and risks of losing federal funding. For example, most school boards in Chester County continued mask mandates absent any emergency declaration in Pennsylvania because they claimed they were at risk of losing federal funding if they did not follow the federal guidelines on masking,” said Grady.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3671bc3c1e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Shapiro unveils $51.4B budget proposal](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6d55735e29&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kevin Kane: Pennsylvania Democrats must stop playing politics and unleash American energy](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d577fb35d7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: A retired sergeant’s unofficial history of the Philadelphia Police Department](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef447c51e4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Groundhog Day arrives early in Chester County](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dd86b834bd&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Frank Speidel: The Nero Awards](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=964058eaad&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Jeff Hurvitz: DEI, rescinded](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=042710fe9d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Delaware County prison officials issued questionable bonuses, records show](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=374ad27f69&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
The Democratic National Committee elected a new leadership team in the wake of their 2024 losses of the White House, the Senate, and the House of Representatives. Philadelphia’s own Malcolm Kenyatta, who likes nothing more than to run for some job other than the one to which the voters of the 181st district elected him, joined the team as one of the DNC’s vice presidents. The faces have changed but, as Byron York notes in the _Washington Examiner_ , the insiders running the party have [learned nothing](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3a2a9bdb73&e=b7b3eddce2) from their failure: "As the DNC, choosing new leadership, surveyed its current position — out of power — leaders told themselves that the causes of the party’s failures are 1). racism and misogyny, and 2). poor communications. That is what losing parties do. Somebody else is to blame.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Guy Ciarrocchi In Pennsylvania, the first week of February brings two rituals: Punxsutawney Phil “tells” us if spring or winter lies ahead, and the Governor presents his state budget plan. Both “characters” told us to prepare for a long, cold winter. Worse, Governor Josh Shapiro’s proclamation isn’t just a fun custom — it’s a sad reality. When Shapiro presented his state budget, we knew he also had two choices: either an “early spring” — focusing on commonsense, bipartisan policies to get meaningful “stuff” done — or a long, cold “winter” — another year of progressive bluster, a budget based on expensive, left-wing ideology, appeasing the loudest fringes, and partisan fighting with Republicans. Well, Pennsylvania, prepare for a long, cold winter. Why It Matters. Shapiro chose to see his shadow — another year, another missed opportunity. Like the fictional movie “Groundhog Day,” we will be forced to re-live 2023 and 2024: cold, bleak and far more painful than necessary. Unlike Phil, Shapiro actually does have power over his own words, the power to choose “spring” or “winter.” He let us down again. Shapiro, who as a candidate and as our newly elected governor, told us that “” and that parents should be able to choose a school that works for their children, said nothing about that subject again. No flowery rhetoric, no pledged funding, no proposed legislation. Worse, he wants to cut funding for cyber charter schools — schools that are actually growing in enrollment. (Maybe, that’s why his teachers union buddies lobbied him to cut those students’ funds.) Promises made, promises broken. | | 2. By Beth Ann Rosica Shannon Grady, a world class triathlete, sports scientist, and Delco native, advocated keeping boys and men out of girls and women’s sports long before it was the mainstream view. She appeared on a local TV program in and explained that Biden’s executive order was in direct conflict with Title IX. “Anytime a male takes the place of a female, you are eliminating opportunities for a female, but in essence, you are actually changing the dynamics of the entire team and the teams you play against.” Grady, a physiologist and the author of The Lactate Revolution, said there is a trickle-down effect on allowing boys in girls sports. “Both the team with the boy and the team playing against that team are adversely impacted.” Grady continued to call out the Biden order as unconstitutional and unfair to women and girls. Her efforts paid off this week when she was invited to the White House by President Donald Trump to attend the signing of the “Keeping Men out of Women’s Sports” . Why It Matters. “With my action this afternoon,” the president said, “we are putting every school receiving taxpayer dollars on notice that if you let men take over women’s sports teams or invade your locker rooms, you will be investigated for violations of Title IX and risk your federal funding,” he said. “So this will effectively end the attack on female athletes at public K-12 schools and virtually all U.S. colleges and universities.” Grady is thrilled with the order and potential consequences for schools that do not comply. She has witnessed first hand the detrimental effects of the prior president’s orders and looks forward to righting the ship. Quotable. “It will be interesting to see what actions the Chester County school boards make regarding this executive action given their recent history of admitting abiding to federal guidelines especially when it comes to Title IX and risks of losing federal funding. For example, most school boards in Chester County continued mask mandates absent any emergency declaration in Pennsylvania because they claimed they were at risk of losing federal funding if they did not follow the federal guidelines on masking,” said Grady. | | 3\. # [Why have American sports become so political?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156739906&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NzM5OTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxMTExMjYsImV4cCI6MTc0MTcwMzEyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NdIB2ZN96r8Gsr9FacGXD2RMh51NXXDhX8kCsdrH0EM)
### It's time to rise above the politicization of sports!
Feb 9
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156739906&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NzM5OTA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTExMTEyNiwiZXhwIjoxNzQxNzAzMTI2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.QP5GjRwJWjXyd2LTQ_trL1LjGSGomsY0011crfSY0zc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156739906&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NzM5OTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxMTExMjYsImV4cCI6MTc0MTcwMzEyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NdIB2ZN96r8Gsr9FacGXD2RMh51NXXDhX8kCsdrH0EM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156739906&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2NzM5OTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxMTExMjYsImV4cCI6MTc0MTcwMzEyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NdIB2ZN96r8Gsr9FacGXD2RMh51NXXDhX8kCsdrH0EM)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/why-have-american-sports-become-so?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/6344233a-2622-4d4b-8bae-948f6ddc455b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6344233a-2622-4d4b-8bae-948f6ddc455b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm old enough to remember when Americans could watch sports without worrying about politics. In fact, turning on the game with a few buddies was a way to _escape_ from the doldrums of the everyday grind, whether it was unwinding after a long day at work or spending the weekend alongside fellow fans who bonded over one thing and one thing only: their support for the local squad.
Alas, that is not the case anymore. Whether it's Taylor Swift's endorsement of Kamala Harris or Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy throwing in his hat for Trump, it seems that the line between politics and culture has been blurred to the point that every celebrity or sports figure must declare their political allegiances if they are to remain relevant in the postmodern age. Either players take a knee during the National Anthem or they stand-there is no in between. But how did we get here? When did it start? Let's rewind for a moment and identify exactly when this transition occurred.
Andrew Breitbart famously said, "Politics is downstream of culture." At the time, the celebrity-President Obama was poised to begin his second term. As Breitbart put it on the stage at CPAC in 2012, "this is not your mom's democratic party." After attending a Super Bowl party with a bunch of far-lefties, Breitbart declared during the same speech, "there's no such thing as a moderate Democrat."
Obama had become the leader of the new Democratic party, and under his leadership the party took a radical turn towards identity politics and critical theory that deemed all the grand narratives upon which America was founded to be worthy only of critique. Anyone who refused to accept that America was inherently evil, or that race was not the most essential aspect of American identity was cast aside. Unfortunately for the Democrats, Americans are not as dumb as they thought, and this hard turn towards identitarian politics proved to be a grave mistake.
_**(Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By 4PAtriots](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent. And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn:
"Food shortages are coming."
**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.**
If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.
**Well, no need to worry anymore.**
Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.
That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling **[Survival Food Kits](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.
**[Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.
**[Stock up now](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on these survival food kits while you can.
[Stock Up Now](https://substack.com/redirect/87b0571a-d6e8-44fb-9f83-05536a27addb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Since then, Breitbart passed away and Steve Bannon took over the publication that bore Breitbart's name. Bannon was Trump's chief strategist and he architected the 2016 campaign around the idea that America's values needed resuscitation if we were to Make America Great Again. At first, this message was scorned by Neo-Con Republicans and Neo-Liberal Democrats alike. It seemed the entirety of America's media establishment-from DC to Hollywood- dismissed Trump's ideas on building a wall to secure the southern border, and implementing tariffs to revivify the dignity of the American worker. As it turned out, they were wrong and Trump was right. The American people have been told that Trump was the disease but now it appears that he may actually be the cure.
Fast forward to the present day, and it's clear that the Democrats have, indeed, suffered the consequences of this hard left turn. For the first time, Trump won the popular vote. MAGA is no longer a counter culture fighting against a dogmatic political and media establishment that controls the narrative. MAGA is mainstream.
A regime can only pull the wool over the eyes of its constituents for so long before they realize that the wolf has been hiding in sheep's clothing all along. If America is such a terrible place, then why did millions make the perilous decision to cross oceans and jungles to come to the United States over the last four years? If the southern border was not in crisis, then why did hundreds millions of migrants overwhelm resources of Democrat-run cities around the country? If the Democrat party was supposed to be the party of free speech, of world peace, and of the American worker, then why were they implementing policies to undermine these principles at every turn?
Alas, this brings us back to the present predicament that Breitbart predicted all the way back in 2012, with one caveat: politics and culture have crossed streams. One's political leanings have become more fundamental than one's favorite team, or the race into which they were born. Rather than lamenting this tectonic shift, I view it as an opportunity for... _Hope_ and _Change_!
I am not asking for celebrities or sports stars to stop sharing their political views. In America, one's voting practices shouldn't be the most fundamental aspect of their identity. This is no surprise considering our families, our local communities, and our small towns have been abandoned in favor of the national struggle over Red vs. Blue. But it wasn't always this way, and it doesn't have to be this way moving forward.
If the night is darkest before dawn, then we have arrived at a new dawn. The paradigm is no longer shifting, it has shifted. It's high time that Democrats realize they have missed the train. Whether a celebrity or a sports figure, those who supported Kamala Harris must realize that supporting America does not make you a racist or a misogynist or a Nazi. Quite the contrary, those who supported censorship of political opposition and mobilized private companies to shut down advocates of Trump or of scientific scrutiny, were the real fascists after all.
If Dave Portnoy and Taylor Swift can endorse different candidates but still get along (see video above), then we can all follow suit. I'm no fan of the Eagles or the Chiefs, but as we plop down on a couch to watch the game tonight let's not forget: America is the greatest country on earth, and together we can make it even more great!

# _PolitiBrawl Book Recommendation:_ How the Jester Became King: Dave Portnoy and the Unauthorized Real Story of Barstool Sports
Dave Portnoy's **[unpredictable rise to fame and fortune](https://substack.com/redirect/3a1eadcc-6068-4681-b5c7-22bf87d2c04e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** didn't happen overnight. And as Barstool's Kevin Clancy explained, "It'll never happen again."
From handing out newspapers alone in a dirty subway station, to selling his digital media company for half a billion dollars, and then buying it back for $1, Portnoy's 20-year, controversy-filled Barstool Sports adventure is one you have to read to believe.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a1eadcc-6068-4681-b5c7-22bf87d2c04e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

clean_body: It's time to rise above the politicization of sports! | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? It's time to rise above the politicization of sports! Feb 9 | | | | | | | | | | | I'm old enough to remember when Americans could watch sports without worrying about politics. In fact, turning on the game with a few buddies was a way to escape from the doldrums of the everyday grind, whether it was unwinding after a long day at work or spending the weekend alongside fellow fans who bonded over one thing and one thing only: their support for the local squad. Alas, that is not the case anymore. Whether it's Taylor Swift's endorsement of Kamala Harris or Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy throwing in his hat for Trump, it seems that the line between politics and culture has been blurred to the point that every celebrity or sports figure must declare their political allegiances if they are to remain relevant in the postmodern age. Either players take a knee during the National Anthem or they stand-there is no in between. But how did we get here? When did it start? Let's rewind for a moment and identify exactly when this transition occurred. Andrew Breitbart famously said, "Politics is downstream of culture." At the time, the celebrity-President Obama was poised to begin his second term. As Breitbart put it on the stage at CPAC in 2012, "this is not your mom's democratic party." After attending a Super Bowl party with a bunch of far-lefties, Breitbart declared during the same speech, "there's no such thing as a moderate Democrat." Obama had become the leader of the new Democratic party, and under his leadership the party took a radical turn towards identity politics and critical theory that deemed all the grand narratives upon which America was founded to be worthy only of critique. Anyone who refused to accept that America was inherently evil, or that race was not the most essential aspect of American identity was cast aside. Unfortunately for the Democrats, Americans are not as dumb as they thought, and this hard turn towards identitarian politics proved to be a grave mistake. (Piece continues below) The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis | | ---|---|--- This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent. And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: "Food shortages are coming." As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Since then, Breitbart passed away and Steve Bannon took over the publication that bore Breitbart's name. Bannon was Trump's chief strategist and he architected the 2016 campaign around the idea that America's values needed resuscitation if we were to Make America Great Again. At first, this message was scorned by Neo-Con Republicans and Neo-Liberal Democrats alike. It seemed the entirety of America's media establishment-from DC to Hollywood- dismissed Trump's ideas on building a wall to secure the southern border, and implementing tariffs to revivify the dignity of the American worker. As it turned out, they were wrong and Trump was right. The American people have been told that Trump was the disease but now it appears that he may actually be the cure. Fast forward to the present day, and it's clear that the Democrats have, indeed, suffered the consequences of this hard left turn. For the first time, Trump won the popular vote. MAGA is no longer a counter culture fighting against a dogmatic political and media establishment that controls the narrative. MAGA is mainstream. A regime can only pull the wool over the eyes of its constituents for so long before they realize that the wolf has been hiding in sheep's clothing all along. If America is such a terrible place, then why did millions make the perilous decision to cross oceans and jungles to come to the United States over the last four years? If the southern border was not in crisis, then why did hundreds millions of migrants overwhelm resources of Democrat-run cities around the country? If the Democrat party was supposed to be the party of free speech, of world peace, and of the American worker, then why were they implementing policies to undermine these principles at every turn? Alas, this brings us back to the present predicament that Breitbart predicted all the way back in 2012, with one caveat: politics and culture have crossed streams. One's political leanings have become more fundamental than one's favorite team, or the race into which they were born. Rather than lamenting this tectonic shift, I view it as an opportunity for... Hope and Change! I am not asking for celebrities or sports stars to stop sharing their political views. In America, one's voting practices shouldn't be the most fundamental aspect of their identity. This is no surprise considering our families, our local communities, and our small towns have been abandoned in favor of the national struggle over Red vs. Blue. But it wasn't always this way, and it doesn't have to be this way moving forward. If the night is darkest before dawn, then we have arrived at a new dawn. The paradigm is no longer shifting, it has shifted. It's high time that Democrats realize they have missed the train. Whether a celebrity or a sports figure, those who supported Kamala Harris must realize that supporting America does not make you a racist or a misogynist or a Nazi. Quite the contrary, those who supported censorship of political opposition and mobilized private companies to shut down advocates of Trump or of scientific scrutiny, were the real fascists after all. If Dave Portnoy and Taylor Swift can endorse different candidates but still get along (see video above), then we can all follow suit. I'm no fan of the Eagles or the Chiefs, but as we plop down on a couch to watch the game tonight let's not forget: America is the greatest country on earth, and together we can make it even more great! PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. To access exclusive content and support our work, consider becoming a paid subscriber. PolitiBrawl Book Recommendation: How the Jester Became King: Dave Portnoy and the Unauthorized Real Story of Barstool Sports Dave Portnoy's didn't happen overnight. And as Barstool's Kevin Clancy explained, "It'll never happen again." From handing out newspapers alone in a dirty subway station, to selling his digital media company for half a billion dollars, and then buying it back for $1, Portnoy's 20-year, controversy-filled Barstool Sports adventure is one you have to read to believe. | | ---|---|--- * | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. subject: All-hands-on-deck moment for those who care about the future of this country.
body:
Republicans have a very slim House majority. We just need to organize and flip a small number of them to stop them.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=368%2E2563979%2EjvB32z)

$5.
That is the contribution Kamala Harris is asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee today. Not next week. The DNC needs you today.
$5 to help Democrats organize to stop Republican efforts to pass tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans while making cuts to Medicaid, Medicare and the Affordable Care Act.
$5 to help Democrats stop an unelected billionaire and his team from getting access to Americans' personal tax and health care data while gutting departments that fund veterans' health care and public education — including Head Start.
$5 because the next election is going to be one of the most important in modern history, and we need to flip the House and Senate to stop total Republican control of our government.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for people who care about the future of this country.
Republicans have a very slim House majority. We just need to organize and flip a small number of them to stop them.
And there is no organization better positioned or responsible for the job than the DNC.
[**Please rush a $5 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. They will put your donation to work stopping Trump's agenda and flipping the House and Senate in the next election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250209&refcode2=368_2563979_jvB32z&akid=368%2E2563979%2EjvB32z)

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Democrats defend progressive progress while Republicans create chaos nationwide … and everything else you need to know in the states.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, February 9th, 2025. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAL5rRHvbc_mf9F3-4nFxKvMzDMqzVyLq-3o0_DDG9y1j0p4Heb3X1JRMsKxHv-I6PvG6d-bKGr0zzyWjgtYqUGZow-pDmKpKE9vWXSemp3b5zwCIMKIikZGfxEQwwpt_q1B5GEjMCjqRx7c0BBepK4tmfhKb8Xp6d0wRctXVdDo2VgvPbiHEP3-Fz5as5tdpLpyZM1VwoAuSfK3WZiWXOzlcrlmtFk4UfwdhvRxyhtxxhgM00hb6O8lmIRdAvTZSdkOEGhUz9DhQWOjJRzFeHvFvSRYsM5ymQmCDJEPx-pUxMwLPB82JxqxEE5OovRZ25MMBpAqozQtNVxMchFA26kDokFPOmOp7HONaJ1m0aW1kRYn0nu50U5y-614gRFshVxQjqOyXK5jVytW1mU5_LFQ/4dv/IsdMfahvSh-MEBM0y-KUBA/h0/h001.F7Wctho1Q5HP6XSAGi-D4BXCjD6xo4mWGUDFTyYLMLo)
---
1️⃣ **_California:_ Democrats approve $50 million to defend progressive policies **
State Dems allocated $50 million in funding to defend the state’s progressive policies against challenges by the Trump administration. [They are gearing up for legal battles surrounding key issues like immigration and federal abuse of the Constitution → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1RHA-_gftpK7KWi_Uh9RlotMAcLvUF3zSs5t5sxoeozxevY3pGjYMSXXrIo6sra8Svc558qLt8GSJ1l02oBBmSbK2dU89AtbJ0x5KQefREdNMiir7wSpUJVKeyCOC-GIHftoNS9JIY4EiTVEjLSzMCoMUq_kpxSQsreSPKeswmzaLPU--SuqWEK0SumwEPEzQO0bEh2N_4Nv9lIHjGC6RHkUtX4ohdY_4zpCw5Vs98Hyi9UK1vGHZ3DIAqVeQLY3npHbMv7XzIHnzENj3jlslnZMM1pdtrzs8NuxdTG4WikjVvLDOlMBa4ebKNGvAYqHhtOUOywFJgbQI02fjLAWouVQjzH0JCDCUS0TMwmtL_27emahBXs4Iv2nBTInlKlLyoXaCiki2hcjMQhPJhLSJ14O7uTAfA7Igbcyn4iuBi9nSL7B9zkggyHnUA9sknl2kzbZCw_d3KnTVAT_3-Tex1WR9dih9fTAfJ1tCj5qNwvAEE5vOZCp8G0iMoY2j7CwYgvdfGAcFlJdzcLvdufDrpKGXTLzzEVyEm32EuBDzlJGNojc_q7UZCIeLLz2u9fPej_hwELaV0DAHGGyElwvuSWbeHs4RNYC0dNBKZSRD5hTw/4dv/IsdMfahvSh-MEBM0y-KUBA/h1/h001.YGnjLlYHjWskgiFTZ7ur7SnvvkH5Sh-DSEr0DiDeC3w)
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats are exposing the local negative impacts of federal cuts **
VA House Speaker Don Scott is forming a bipartisan committee to study the impacts of what's happening in DC on federal workers and the budget in Virginia. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, February 9th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ California: Democrats approve $50 million to defend progressive policies State Dems allocated $50 million in funding to defend the state’s progressive policies against challenges by the Trump administration. 2️⃣ Virginia: Democrats are exposing the local negative impacts of federal cuts VA House Speaker Don Scott is forming a bipartisan committee to study the impacts of what's happening in DC on federal workers and the budget in Virginia. 3️⃣ Trump Firewall: State legislatures safeguard key programs under attack from the GOP While Trump’s federal funding freeze threatened to raise costs and wreak havoc on people’s lives, Democrats in the states have sprung into action to protect targeted programs. 🔦 Spotlight: DLCC announces Maine Spotlight candidate The DLCC announced support for Maine Spotlight candidate Sean Faircloth. He is facing an upcoming special election to defend a critical seat in the Maine state House, and is ready to jump into the fight against right-wing extremism threatening his state. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Peter,

**The level of funding and scale of their operation is ALARMING!**

The extreme Left knows a Republican Senate Majority is CRITICAL to the success of President Trump's plan to stop the invasion at our Southern Border and rebuild our economy.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Millions of us all across the country voted against Trump’s agenda and are committed to fighting back. Will you join us today?
body:
---
Derek, Trump has begun his presidency with a historically low approval rating. And it’s no wonder why. Since he was inaugurated, he and his allies have begun enacting their extreme, dangerous Project 2025 agenda. So far, they have rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid, pardoned more than 1,500 January 6 insurrectionists, and enacted tariffs against our allies that will raise the price of everyday goods – from groceries to fuel – for working families. This is just the beginning. That’s why right now is the time to dig deep and fight back. Here at the DNC, we are committed to building the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. That’s why we’re reaching out today. Your donation today will be another dollar we can invest in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. [**Millions of us — all over the country — voted against Trump’s agenda and are committed to fighting back. disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
They’re slashing essential government programs as quickly as they can to lay the groundwork for a massive, trillion dollar tax cut for billionaires and corporations.
#

Team — Mark Kelly here.
About 40 years ago, I was on a ship carrying food assistance to Egypt. It was a goodwill mission, part of our foreign policy in the 1980s.
It’s a mission that’s very familiar to the thousands and thousands of Americans who have served with USAID since it was established in the 1960s. There are millions of people around the world who were fed, clothed, given medical care, educated, or otherwise supported by USAID in the 60 years since.
Foreign aid — much of which passes through USAID — is less than 1% of our budget. For that investment we do an enormous amount of good in the world, and we keep our own nation safe by preventing pandemics and conflict.
By now, most of you have heard that Elon Musk and the Trump administration are dismantling USAID. It’s a bad move, and I want to be clear about this: They’ll be held accountable, one way or another.
But the bigger question of why this is happening — why foreign assistance, why USAID, with all of the good it accomplishes — is essential to consider. **They’re slashing essential government programs as quickly as they can to lay the groundwork for a massive, trillion-dollar tax cut for billionaires and corporations.**
The White House and Elon Musk are flooding the zone with outrageous, illegal, and unconstitutional actions to try and keep us off balance. But we’re fighting back in the Senate with every tool available to us, and lawsuits challenging these actions are rising through the courts at a rapid pace.
They want us off balance, but I am holding my ground. They want you to feel powerless, but you are not. They want us to think they have full control, but the rule of law still exists.
I am not going to back down, but it’s going to take all of us doing what we can to push back.
[**So, please. If you can, chip in $3 or anything you can afford to support my work. It’d mean a lot to have you with me.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250209-1-f&t=1&akid=5959%2E6688874%2EJjfpdu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

[**It’s corrupt. It’s un-Democratic. So I’m marshaling a HISTORIC grassroots response to show Trump, Musk, and Republicans that their billions will NEVER overshadow the importance of grassroots support. [**THEN:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101828694/527197838/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250209_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGUxZjNhYi1mN2U2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKq3wCu1ZbsTKOYFjD-8qlEUanFQVhFYbJ1HjU14r2I=) Trump nominated nearly a DOZEN far-right billionaires like Musk to his administration. SPOILER ALERT – they are NOT concerned about health care or your kitchen table costs. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta86e63be-cc83-45f3-8d11-2e4a117a3784/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, Trump and his cronies are attacking one of the things that truly makes America great: our diversity. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T894abe96-1050-4289-a451-1e8776f9c2f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) His chaotic, confusing policies are already leaving minority groups without access to key support services – and his attacks on equal opportunity programs are only going to get worse. That’s why we need to get ready now to defend diversity in our workplaces, schools, military, and anywhere else these key programs are attacked. [If you believe in the value of diversity, will you please make a special contribution to Blue Amp Action today? We are investing in Democrats at all levels who are fighting to protect DEI from being destroyed by the Trump administration, and your support will keep our work going. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08808e9a-269b-464b-ad90-24953490b23d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef4b15f3-84c1-4426-9190-8e641eec499b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?t=1&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=2&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD) **BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it." [**Jamie Raskin is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.09_Raskin-EC-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=3&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD) | | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.09_Raskin-EC-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=4&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Rep. Jamie Raskin is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.09_Raskin-EC-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=5&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD)
| [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.09_Raskin-EC-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=6&akid=22846%2E4449941%2EGNgdvD)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

clean_body: Extremists are already readying their millions to flip my district. They know that winning this seat could save their House Majority in 2026. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Folks, I've been shouting it from the rooftops! 🗣️ And now, even the pundits are finally catching on: “Democrats have a Florida problem” \- POLITICO = = Extremists are already readying their millions to flip my district. They know that winning this seat could save their House Majority in 2026. We can’t let that happen. I ran for Congress to fight for everyday Floridians and protect the issues that matter most – Medicare and Social Security, advocating for gun safety, and lowering costs for everyday Americans. These aren’t just talking points to me. They’re promises I’ve made and fights I take on every single day. But to keep those fights going, we need to get a head start on my campaign’s organizing efforts to reach every voter in FL-23. body:
I’m hoping you can chip in $3 today and help me continue to stand strong for our progressive values.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1499%2E791427%2EqxcwQZ)

Friend, I’m reaching out today because, despite everything that has happened since Trump took office, we need to make sure our fundraising stays on track.
So, I’m hoping you can chip in $3 today and help me continue to stand strong for our progressive values.
$3 because Elon Musk and Republicans have been personally attacking me from all sides this week.
$3 because we need to build a nationwide, grassroots movement that can oppose Trump and Elon’s takeover.
$3 because we’ve never taken a dime from corporate Super PACs or far-right mega-donors to fund this campaign.
I know $3 doesn’t sound like much in the face of billionaire oligarchs, but trust me, it all adds up. And we have seen time and time again that a grassroots funded campaign can win if we stay organized.
**[Chip in your $3 right now and join the thousands of others who are doing the same. Your help is more critical now than ever before.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250209-1-120&t=2&akid=1499%2E791427%2EqxcwQZ)

| [ ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Hlhv-I75pJu1DjGNb_c3Tt9GdrV7UP9UZt-jJpNEAqH7SUR7QR6t9HhABTb4Hj2V9NfUvUXEm3-YNL6mUC9ordFf23k-lbIpcEdWRPm9LIxLp40n70a6xBPkD_UgLjZqJMBoKGfXpq4Ohf-5ONJGwCZ3w3BWuPO6pTTPWe1Uba3H9Zj0KOF8wTALSJQnJVJnlLt_SCIO-CWwf-Z7Vpx0tKtoF8wdXvQFq6c1axljE50boNVlMB9WCUlMfLMOvlfPOIc1LBazi2Tge1uY_1umopskiUlE1nB_0SGVGbjFdTvO34M-7D94gHWfharc2qnbEU7pGUlENOCg6MFtCwstTeLKQLCcGyIVizxIkTRRoJF8WGJMxOibY9DAEQ0PNfLNv-G0vHSoPZtxSXmumW5RYM9h1T7Ut2BU4bAxWKpGm5KxS6-fQlfPhNSG02m1WHYDOPlWhybUVNE8L19qQzvuhGuCFIayTowZ7R_KwJBl_DU3OkWCAkogaWC7cd44aufC-3VuKGMgU33MTM41cHhpIukBOL4ryZi-yHWf6hKkwJFtCXwID26z4v6cchOvda4SsyDwXzmZCHXo6l35qfFgvetJYvp8ucrntO_LOaSbvnEjbMkece5lKxZoi4_VmjritHbU075UsEx9nOQ7O4ocnfaeArmYKS45P2Cv8LEnwTBKW5rbAZim_ATLvv56GXp9hBuZAF1PEBhR6pgM1tzyMv9Fz9AsDOF2AyzIYl2iw5JXao6lwzAlEW_EpGiarU8qsms5ml3s6GbZSgGggdDbeZuJNt_MNOT1zvbBwSDpzcO7E3vtcd_Qv5at0ON48KQ/oYRRdSiK0fWT9T2J-7IBCrjddMFql_gc/5) Dear Fellow Conservative, As I reflect on the current state of our nation, I'm reminded of the importance of standing together against wasteful foreign aid. While Democrats and the liberal media cry foul over President Trump's freeze on foreign aid, they conveniently ignore the billions of dollars wasted on questionable programs abroad. We can't let them get away with it, Fellow Conservative. **[It's time to hold them accountable for their reckless spending habits and stand up for responsible governance.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/S_H0mGXHXoq-UEHIfD8ol0gjPTxP8HQUn1hahKydFS7gnFwnIkNb93pNLKkcgEpdZdNJ1wELYn0AazBORwag3LTuq2cyCNQIewFZCO1sJGz4HI5JismcV3p1VD0Pr5AqkJ3Ux-T7WhyZ2SuH_Q3cnqmGX0IfaV2RQWaQHgDrL4LmT2PlWUarwXqA0gQB6Iu0jPlMpHi9ceP-K1QgiseDHvkUUZthBuULJgfQijORhTlBX6vzmZqI43wv5IHUsbf6ZxYGi1_KdnVgV_HxZ0a7KFQSeFRNfc6DDSG5dN2gLr0Oxn9bEzX9VFcvMiFYIoSS4FuXjPyVQDzDMKmXjO9nRIFJ8-3Kw03-21HGDrd1_2ce8_Lk10qeZwNCJJue5cuCa-DEi-KURheMjHFfJ0C0tw45lbpV9L6E82hK8zuYRSLkMa1Z_V8QUdqOu6dtLpv6X3gDs0VnwWpf2eQmXERzbQak_EG7vTJQ0NAFxTaeUf9g71ENIUaNcAbfxa7bmTCPA9q6K1B-966vP3bdS4odKP4MfvnZYJfaaPEONewaeDfpdIYBsZrXqOzMP-hfS1FNmR-JVTW6ElHy4LlsL8MZi5xeJycIABcNnBm-E4ylEC5eJ1S1MAN-p_9B8Orq7D9HLiPjWpQ6TbGVwcNumfQUoMFgAPqf2UDAhovSe1iTdVvN5nY2GCbBTcmo9ESjRYTOHKpvLq4gWnsFvS8ofNMvflHrZ3Wd6BwrZPsuGJiulSkVf5YOEhVBWYQbqAHQfsOgiffCjhV0oZoCe_JWyZgoslhxVWmtMTj6dMiqIfyHFWppM2bfaij1eVV4hUnjvvamJyot7d9Fb8vB/VeRWGxnAkTCq-maA7KzP5ExCnhipWNaW/5)** That's why I'm counting on your support to continue fighting for a more efficient and effective government. Recently, President Trump took a bold step in freezing millions in USAID funds for foreign media, sparking outrage from globalists and left-wing groups. But we know that this decision is a crucial step towards putting America first and ending the era of corporate welfare. [Will you stand with us against wasteful foreign aid and support our efforts to promote responsible governance?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Bj9n5JQx37VK4Wn_BY-VBP0pSD10Lpm__tSISX8c7wXj_4XTZG-vhaDFXw_eqbePbPJ6L6679PUrJgpQtZDMwv2G22YHMdo9Brb9flimXyWZanhu52x3xdKTJYI7LygZiKSXytWI0cZNhE2q1mdIfZbDgqZA-Q3kjwgOxAkbyXYRfZu-qhjqV1kBmlEEGoTO7JE371tJVecbpy2PrRF_JxcfZ1zzM2AFqOPXFt5xCpUCMgf72gqSqbR3Mt5QfEEvP0E4EWS76NnyFN-0OA__tXjB1hUtQVRFUM-yPRgOkmK69wGMp1ayySIR_ieIfw5QeMDgrl8vHkwPKE5SZQ8LkGuO8QCLso-ogikeGy1rfxv5F-4JTL5M_gvkjLhkf96M09Ctn7avI01dFN6t2tcJs3j5LNxZc-ClBcn5VjY9GHcClKK7zL5RTAOfM6jeK6B_KUH3k4qj7eckFgt-ineIbOE93jb--ClIZdfUDvtJSEdYgW0qX_4bMfHwvH3lErsRAgaOFwRAymxAO61tW1Z4N3GropvgpuwALd9e6FXQKQfmHlo2ce3Mx6D3hDRmLICIXIz7-SA2uPYxq8RLlxxtI8RjvgWX7kNKmzZFtbx5hjYyvrpdxOjDv3ja8mmKsGtT2ra-mGGFCcqiT1LLqE9EkIHKfZYsSPtVdKnC3kkR3p_h0Je3t2NTVwd11NjUzGxC8W2EUT2SzQLCFaUh8Y-anMYtnLQw53cJ-UaIkhjnF9AVAN8VTzfOAbBara8RWTwtuPEM-s-fwBrBiCqgI-VBr6AsWAArscvgrCv63CqGnDyXasR2TMQ20L5QwG4rbh4/4J9A1wMvDXV1Jv7GJ92oE5hcZYZkurP4/5) Every donation counts, and with your help, we can make a real difference. **Recent Donations From Grassroots Republicans:** _Robert B. from Elk River, MN donated $10.00

clean_body: | Dear Fellow Conservative, As I reflect on the current state of our nation, I'm reminded of the importance of standing together against wasteful foreign aid. While Democrats and the liberal media cry foul over President Trump's freeze on foreign aid, they conveniently ignore the billions of dollars wasted on questionable programs abroad. We can't let them get away with it, Fellow Conservative. That's why I'm counting on your support to continue fighting for a more efficient and effective government. Recently, President Trump took a bold step in freezing millions in USAID funds for foreign media, sparking outrage from globalists and left-wing groups. But we know that this decision is a crucial step towards putting America first and ending the era of corporate welfare. Every donation counts, and with your help, we can make a real difference. Recent Donations From Grassroots Republicans: Robert B. from Elk River, MN donated $10.00 Duane T. from Rocky Mount, NC donated $100.00 Rita M. from Farmersville, TX donated $1.25 Sarah S. from Las Vegas, NV donated $1.00 Kathleen C. from Winter Haven, FL donated $10.00 Your Donation:[PENDING] Suggested Amount: $15 | | | | | | | Thank you for your continued support, Fellow Conservative. Together, we can achieve this. Best regards, Sarah Newby Finance Director, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Letitia James
subject: I stand with our immigrant community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
They are our neighbors, our colleagues, our friends, and family.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101830114/527201422/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1806-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjYwY2M2ZS1mYmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEb39C1m1AmF347k_U70cVbKb4n7uXj6TOcjb_NJpT8=)
---
Peter, in the great state of New York and across our country, immigrants make up a vital part of our communities.
They are our neighbors, our colleagues, our friends, and family. They power our economy, strengthen our culture, and contribute to the future of this state in countless ways.
And yet, our immigrant communities are facing an onslaught of cruel, politically motivated attacks**– threats of mass deportations, efforts to strip away their dignity, and attempts to push our state into enforcing unjust federal policies. **
**Let me be clear:** I will not stand idly by while immigrant families are torn apart for no reason.

I will not allow our Constitution to be undermined by fearmongering and political theater.

And I will _never_ let New York be bullied into breaking the law to fulfill some hate-filled promise.
When it comes to violations of the U.S. Constitution, the Constitution of the state of New York, or the rights of vulnerable and marginalized populations – including the immigrant community – I will not hesitate to take action.
So to any New Yorker who is an immigrant or is close to the immigrant community, I promise you this: In the face of injustice and bigotry, I will continue to stand with the immigrants of New York and beyond – because defending their rights is defending the future of our state and the future of our nation as a whole.

**But it's your grassroots support that enables me to continue these critical fights to defend immigrants and our very Constitution.**
**[_So please, will you help me continue the fight for our immigrant friends and family by donating $5 or whatever you can spare to my campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101830116/527201431/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1806-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjYwY2M2ZS1mYmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CEb39C1m1AmF347k_U70cVbKb4n7uXj6TOcjb_NJpT8=)**

clean_body: They are our neighbors, our colleagues, our friends, and family. | | | = Peter, in the great state of New York and across our country, immigrants make up a vital part of our communities. They are our neighbors, our colleagues, our friends, and family. They power our economy, strengthen our culture, and contribute to the future of this state in countless ways. And yet, our immigrant communities are facing an onslaught of cruel, politically motivated attacks– threats of mass deportations, efforts to strip away their dignity, and attempts to push our state into enforcing unjust federal policies. Let me be clear: I will not stand idly by while immigrant families are torn apart for no reason. I will not allow our Constitution to be undermined by fearmongering and political theater. And I will never let New York be bullied into breaking the law to fulfill some hate-filled promise. When it comes to violations of the U.S. Constitution, the Constitution of the state of New York, or the rights of vulnerable and marginalized populations – including the immigrant community – I will not hesitate to take action. So to any New Yorker who is an immigrant or is close to the immigrant community, I promise you this: In the face of injustice and bigotry, I will continue to stand with the immigrants of New York and beyond – because defending their rights is defending the future of our state and the future of our nation as a whole. But it's your grassroots support that enables me to continue these critical fights to defend immigrants and our very Constitution. = | | = Thank you for standing with me, Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads, and we need you with us to defend our hard-earned progress from MAGA extremism.
#

Good morning, team! We’ll get right to it:
[**Today, we’re emailing you for $5.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250209-1-b&t=1&akid=9959%2E3935704%2Ej_7oLw)
$5 because extreme House Republicans have introduced dangerous legislation pushing for national concealed carry reciprocity and abolishing the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF).
$5 because we need your help to defeat President Trump’s dangerous cabinet nominations like Kash Patel and RFK Jr.
$5 because Trump has already rolled back critical federal gun safety measures during his first few weeks in office. He has dismantled a federal school safety board he created himself after the tragic Parkland massacre, and he’s also seemingly dissolved the federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. The other night, he signed an executive order likely to overturn much of the gun safety progress that President Biden made.
Our gun safety movement is at a crossroads, and we need you with us to defend our hard-earned progress from MAGA extremism.
[**If that is worth $5 to you, then please, use this link to make that $5 contribution today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250209-1-b&t=2&akid=9959%2E3935704%2Ej_7oLw)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Don’t give up — an important message for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends, a few days ago I spoke on the Senate floor about what’s going on with our federal workforce, federal funding, and this Administration.
I’d like to share with you a few words from a letter that I read aloud to our federal workers — 140,000 of whom call Virginia home — and that I hope you may find encouraging as well:
___________________
As you’re all too aware, we’re in a dark time. The Trump Administration wants to kick you around — censoring your free speech, locking you out of your workplaces, demonizing you in the press, and sending you ominous and threatening messages.
This is harmful to you and to the Americans all around the country that you serve.
In dark times, we must stay focused on finding our guiding lights.
I hope you let the call of service that you initially answered to serve as that light.
My advice is simple, even if it’s not easy: Don’t give up.
Keep serving everyday folks. You are here because of your expertise, because of your patriotism, and because you know the value in dedicating your life to serving your fellow Americans.
America needs you — and that has never been clearer than in the wake of the Trump Administration’s federal funding freeze last week.
Americans are counting on you to deliver crucial services, from inspecting our food to ensure it’s safe, to protecting our national security, to administering Social Security benefits, to staffing air traffic control towers, to supporting our allies around the world and keeping the influence of China, Russia, and Iran at bay.
It has been and will continue to be tough.
Donald Trump and his cronies are doing everything they can to knock you down, including offering a scam deal to try to force you out of your job.
Lastly — you aren’t alone. I’ll be here with you every day, working alongside you in service.
I’m doing everything I can to stand up for you, just like you stand up for the American people.
___________________
Our federal workforce is being targeted by Donald Trump and Elon Musk right now, and I’m fighting hard on their behalf. But my words apply to every American who is struggling to find a guiding light amid this Administration’s chaos.
Don’t give up.
You aren’t alone.
I’m doing everything I can to stand up for you.
Thank you for taking the time to read this message.
—Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. clean_body: House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too. This may be the best idea yet. | | | | This is genius, Friend. The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient. Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races. House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey. There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government. And draining the swamp has been part of our mission since DAY 1. House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too. name: Jocelyn Benson for Governor
subject: We can’t let our momentum waver
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
Team, Jocelyn is running for Governor with one goal in mind: **to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.**
But she can’t do it alone. That’s why she’s counting on folks like you to join her campaign from the very beginning and stand with her as she fights to win this toss-up race.
[**Will you chip in any amount today to become a Founding Donor to Jocelyn’s campaign? Your support will help her reach Michiganders all across the state with her vision for the future.**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/581?c0=jmb-em-q12025.9b6-d1&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)

[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q12025.MaH6TA&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/266?c0=jmb-em-q12025.slPEnH&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
---
The momentum for Jocelyn’s campaign is _through the roof_. Not only has she earned key endorsements from state lawmakers and organizations like EMILYs List and End Citizens United, but she’s also received an outpouring of support from Michiganders in Detroit, Grand Rapids, and across the state from people who support her plans to make government work for everyone.
But here’s the thing about momentum. It can waver — and in a place like Michigan where statewide elections almost always come down to the wire, we can’t take any chances.
The 2024 Presidential Election was decided by a margin of **80,000** votes in Michigan, and our US Senate race came down to an even narrower margin of just **19,000** votes.
**That’s why, ahead of what’s sure to be one of the most competitive races in the country in 2026, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us sustain Jocelyn’s momentum and power her to victory.**
Every dollar you contribute to her campaign helps us reach voters in all 83 Michigan counties and spread the word about her plans to defend our freedoms, improve our childcare and public education system, and cut costs for working families.
[**So what do you say? Will you become a Founding Donor to Jocelyn’s campaign for Governor by pitching in a donation today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)

---

---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/264?c0=jmb-em-q12025.M00eo_&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=12&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/265?c0=jmb-em-q12025.MaH6TA&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=13&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)

---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250209_AM1_V1_S1&t=15&akid=90%2E181023%2E9Cz9rE)

Jocelyn can’t win this fight without you. Thank you for standing with her.
— Team Benson

Together, we are going to take on Randy Fine, Trump’s pathetic MAGA puppet—and win. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1ODc0NTYxNzg1NjYwOTMyLFwiclwiOjE0NTg3NDY1ODIwMDEyNjY2MH0iLCJzIjoiMGNmMWJkZmY2OTE4OWUzNyJ9)

Friends,

It’s time for some real talk: _this race is going to be an uphill battle._

Ron DeSantis tried to sabotage Democrats in this special election by giving us as little time as possible to organize and fundraise. Meanwhile, my Republican opponent has been kicking back collecting corporate PAC checks and money from wealthy MAGA donors.

We have a lot of work to do in very little time. But together, we are rapidly building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA and win: **this team has raised _nearly $2 million_ since we launched in December.**

|

__Trump and Randy Fine didn’t see us coming.__

**Randy Fine isn’t in it for us.** He’s a career politician focused on catering to the special interests and massive corporations that fund his campaigns.

I have not, and never will, take money from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or big CEOs. Because we are running this campaign the way it should be run, we rely on individuals like you, Friend, to help us do the work to win.****

|

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LYXNoLVBhdGVsLVNlbmF0ZS1Db25maXJtYXRpb24tSGVhcmluZ18yMDI1MDIwNyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUthc2gtUGF0ZWwtU2VuYXRlLUNvbmZpcm1hdGlvbi1IZWFyaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/DRVpPconZDEg2oGwDD-xfA)

| | Fellow Conservative, Last week, my friend and fellow conservative patriot Kash Patel appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee for his confirmation hearing. His performance was beyond impressive.

The Democrats were DESPERATE to go viral with at least one of their absurd attacks.

But in the end, they failed spectacularly. _They didn 't land a single blow_.

Kash Patel's impressive intellect and commitment to reforming and restoring public faith in the FBI was on fully display. **He 's fully prepared to lead the charge to eliminate leftist lawfare originating from the agency and return the FBI's focus to its core mission - to protect our citizens and uphold the Constitution. **

I posed questions to Kash on a number of topics. You may have seen some of the coverage.

**[Here's a key clip I'd encourage you to watch](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LYXNoLVBhdGVsLVNlbmF0ZS1Db25maXJtYXRpb24tSGVhcmluZ18yMDI1MDIwNyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUthc2gtUGF0ZWwtU2VuYXRlLUNvbmZpcm1hdGlvbi1IZWFyaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/bDQqswJrVTagRFLSHdiMKQ)** regarding how he'll deal with the terrorists who exploited the chaos of the Biden-Harris Border Crisis to sneak into our country.
---
[ **WATCH NOW >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LYXNoLVBhdGVsLVNlbmF0ZS1Db25maXJtYXRpb24tSGVhcmluZ18yMDI1MDIwNyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUthc2gtUGF0ZWwtU2VuYXRlLUNvbmZpcm1hdGlvbi1IZWFyaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/v8T1ELU6YUD_RGlF0Ffqhw)
---
I know why the Democrats want to demonize Kash Patel. It's clear as day.

They are terrified Kash Patel is going to do EXACTLY what President Trump promised.

I'm 100% all in behind Kash and I can't wait for him to get to work as Director of the FBI. The time for fundamental reform is long overdue.

**Let 's get him across the finish line and fight like hell day in and day out to ensure our great nation's best days are ahead of us. **
** **
**[Please rush critical support to sustain our efforts.](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9LYXNoLVBhdGVsLVNlbmF0ZS1Db25maXJtYXRpb24tSGVhcmluZ18yMDI1MDIwNyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUthc2gtUGF0ZWwtU2VuYXRlLUNvbmZpcm1hdGlvbi1IZWFyaW5nJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTU0JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlIn0/7AB8D9j39lcMtQZ_UjRwgQ)** We can't let up for a moment.

I'm grateful to count you among my most dedicated supporters!

For Liberty,
