clean_body: I'm 100% all in behind Kash Patel and can’t wait for him to get to work. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Last week, my friend and fellow conservative patriot Kash Patel appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee for his confirmation hearing. His performance was beyond impressive. The Democrats were DESPERATE to go viral with at least one of their absurd attacks. But in the end, they failed spectacularly. They didn 't land a single blow. Kash Patel's impressive intellect and commitment to reforming and restoring public faith in the FBI was on fully display. He 's fully prepared to lead the charge to eliminate leftist lawfare originating from the agency and return the FBI's focus to its core mission - to protect our citizens and uphold the Constitution. I posed questions to Kash on a number of topics. You may have seen some of the coverage. regarding how he'll deal with the terrorists who exploited the chaos of the Biden-Harris Border Crisis to sneak into our country. I know why the Democrats want to demonize Kash Patel. It's clear as day. They are terrified Kash Patel is going to do EXACTLY what President Trump promised. I'm 100% all in behind Kash and I can't wait for him to get to work as Director of the FBI. The time for fundamental reform is long overdue. Let 's get him across the finish line and fight like hell day in and day out to ensure our great nation's best days are ahead of us. We can't let up for a moment. I'm grateful to count you among my most dedicated supporters! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: 11 years in prison for saving a life
body:
| | | Good news, bad news
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=820c573c180948a8af23d01dafec08bb&_e=8vrw9Bqp2c8Rw5hg0YJdzFMCZovcLanIbUT9Jo3PYkON_HvwA7PqrG0brYc6AebJp1c8mOBgoy9d3AxBwb119hTV2DNPI0YmyjJwdVoSTMLJTSv7jPxQ_pYoUbPhsONQ45I4uXuljqnkpwETysl4hy60d8UAS3nZIoutRkeDlavZEgQU7WEXJHOS7FSKVv7rx8C6F3zIJHZyIWBRU49vj3MqnzJJkdL7KKh7inzt9G7s8AXKElglWjCILu8LQ1lFMHp3KsfNqFOR0ZRD4hTRB1kH1NEQ5WV7UgvuKh6sazCPjehkuJ7EXsb6a-R5S4J1ha-FNgnblP-227IDO7YQmrN8vpEsTqPv_LH2CAGB_UUZk-lqrIWrKKsTfhhSBzIj)
---
Peter, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. **[**As a patriot who backs the blue, I'm asking you to donate $35 or more in the next 24 hours.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=820c573c180948a8af23d01dafec08bb&_e=8vrw9Bqp2c8Rw5hg0YJdzFMCZovcLanIbUT9Jo3PYkON_HvwA7PqrG0brYc6AebJp1c8mOBgoy9d3AxBwb119hTV2DNPI0YmyjJwdVoSTMLJTSv7jPxQ_pYoUbPhsONQ45I4uXuljqnkpwETysl4hy60d8UAS3nZIoutRkeDlavZEgQU7WEXJHOS7FSKVv7rx8C6F3zIJHZyIWBRU49vj3MqnzJJkdL7KKh7inzt9G4SHBEtYzz0bfxsRDkgbAdULvf-19e4DwFJJfboNe7HNMp-1rX83uAfQsHgdHD5W6UkEfGqsd3VZEKTynEhEOLqEPNYfWu3-XaSNtjuQ18YFVXhkI3r7nF4J38Ow-N78OZJAWTrzp_mshHWxk3rNetk)** It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life.**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more right away to help fund Brad's case.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=820c573c180948a8af23d01dafec08bb&_e=8vrw9Bqp2c8Rw5hg0YJdzFMCZovcLanIbUT9Jo3PYkON_HvwA7PqrG0brYc6AebJp1c8mOBgoy9d3AxBwb119hTV2DNPI0YmyjJwdVoSTMLJTSv7jPxQ_pYoUbPhsONQ45I4uXuljqnkpwETysl4hy60d8UAS3nZIoutRkeDlavZEgQU7WEXJHOS7FSKVv7rx8C6F3zIJHZyIWBRU49vj3MqnzJJkdL7KKh7inzt9G7NsRzyiV7IsZ6mnocy28HIJrFRtg-FrKLmYFbCIeYTfe97alI7f3rFmSCcZWyv5fRZjAzl8p_El87XZ_MzrgVt2a_SVjzAc_vr8Atg1vg9nEWGYjDZjnycnn5BiLPOnAEWPdV3gjKivVbSL7pwncYn)** You see, trials are expensive.
---
* Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes.
* The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags.
* And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one.

---
It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help.**[**Can I count on you to donate $35 or more right away?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=820c573c180948a8af23d01dafec08bb&_e=8vrw9Bqp2c8Rw5hg0YJdzFMCZovcLanIbUT9Jo3PYkON_HvwA7PqrG0brYc6AebJp1c8mOBgoy9d3AxBwb119hTV2DNPI0YmyjJwdVoSTMLJTSv7jPxQ_pYoUbPhsONQ45I4uXuljqnkpwETysl4hy60d8UAS3nZIoutRkeDlavZEgQU7WEXJHOS7FSKVv7rx8C6F3zIJHZyIWBRU49vj3MqnzJJkdL7KKh7inzt9G5rIU4esZHzSXSHSLOgkVJZF8Ad4MpbCnkMMtQN5lfWGsIWSeVKhI5c5fnL5GrIJdxRK1TciuztW0T7eqoNBfOCDCGQlvvqvjlj-aJwD12axN9aanTT3TOQlDLnIlNfPu7QGNU33Z2u0Ya_PljxcPMe)** Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers.
---
Sincerely,

name: Save Free Speech via Our Revolution
subject: Trump's doubling down on his attacks on the media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1011?refcode=email-020925_v&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump’s been calling the media “the enemy of the people” for years,
threatening to use the power of the government to muzzle journalism he
disagrees with. Now, he’s launching vicious attacks on our freedom of
speech...and we’re going to hold the line to protect it.

After spending months last fall complaining about a 60 Minutes interview
CBS did with Kamala Harris, Trump still can’t let it go. He’s suing CBS
for $10 billion and has pushed his FCC chairman to launch formal
investigations into the media on his hit list – CBS, NPR, and PBS,

But even scarier? His scare tactics seem to be working.

News is leaking that CBS’s parent company is thinking of settling the
lawsuit even though experts agree the case has no legal merit, emboldening
Trump to silence the media over and over again. But we are NOT going to
let him get away with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]Our Citizen Action team is already hard at work to raise the alarm and
activate the grassroots in this fight. Will you chip in to help us protect
freedom of speech and save NPR, PBS, and the rest of our independent media
from Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-020925nd&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump vowed over and over again to get the FCC to strip the broadcast
licenses from networks he disapproves of. Now he’s unleashed a Project
2025 author and new FCC chairman Brendan Carr to do his dirty work — and
CBS, NPR and PBS are first on the list.

Make no mistake: Trump is coming after the First Amendment. And he’s
recruited Musk to join him – first he vowed to defund NPR, and now this
ominous threat:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21433?t=1060&akid=7676%2E5885482%2E5xGXMW ][IMG]

The good news is we still have time to stop them. To do things like defund
our public media, Republicans will need almost UNANIMOUS support in
Congress. So we’re going to unleash thousands of constituents concerned
about these attacks and overwhelm Congress with demands to protect free
speech.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, Trump’s been calling the media “the enemy of the people” for years, threatening to use the power of the government to muzzle journalism he disagrees with. Now, he’s launching vicious attacks on our freedom of speech...and we’re going to hold the line to protect it. After spending months last fall complaining about a 60 Minutes interview CBS did with Kamala Harris, Trump still can’t let it go. He’s suing CBS for $10 billion and has pushed his FCC chairman to launch formal investigations into the media on his hit list – CBS, NPR, and PBS, But even scarier? His scare tactics seem to be working. News is leaking that CBS’s parent company is thinking of settling the lawsuit even though experts agree the case has no legal merit, emboldening Trump to silence the media over and over again. But we are NOT going to let him get away with it. [ ]Our Citizen Action team is already hard at work to raise the alarm and activate the grassroots in this fight. Will you chip in to help us protect freedom of speech and save NPR, PBS, and the rest of our independent media from Trump? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Trump vowed over and over again to get the FCC to strip the broadcast licenses from networks he disapproves of. Now he’s unleashed a Project 2025 author and new FCC chairman Brendan Carr to do his dirty work — and CBS, NPR and PBS are first on the list. Make no mistake: Trump is coming after the First Amendment. And he’s recruited Musk to join him – first he vowed to defund NPR, and now this ominous threat: [ ][IMG] The good news is we still have time to stop them. To do things like defund our public media, Republicans will need almost UNANIMOUS support in Congress. So we’re going to unleash thousands of constituents concerned about these attacks and overwhelm Congress with demands to protect free speech. [ ]Together we can make this massive — waging powerful demonstrations in front of the Capitol and in districts across the country to force Congress to act. Will you chip in to make it happen? If Trump can silence anyone who dares to report the truth, he’ll be free to spread all the lies and disinformation he likes. All while making billions pushing the platforms he and his tech oligarch cronies own. Let’s stop him, together. When we organize, we win. subject: Be an MVP for our service members ahead of the big game!
body:
Make a gift that will be DOUBLED now
[](https://www.uso.org)

---
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[MATCH YOUR GIFT
BEFORE TIMES RUN OUT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj0KdYCx/S0gvM1VyU0FTRmowTGp1KzJYNHBPWDRneS9sSEtES1RrYXQ5WHFHZzUyS1A2c252MFo3MUJtNmVMQ21jelN3c092Zjc4cDVvRGc4TThFRjFWSFV3QStBUFZaN0RzSFJaRSs4MEY0K1pyQUE9S0/YzMwNTJHcW9ISjZlY2drUGdOZ0RNclRvMTZjeWk2bnFCMUh0czJTeEgrcmM3cVA1STNURm1vKzBCRnd2NUFwNFdlSkxDMVptcU8xOEk5SFVJRlgyalhmY3ZDZW4vOVd3S0)
---
The teams are ready to take the field, and USO Centers all over the world are preparing to host viewing parties for our service members -- but it won't be the same as watching at home.
In Europe, service members won't be tuning in until after midnight -- and only a truly thrilling game will keep our service members in the Middle East awake for the whole game after it kicks off at 3 a.m.
As these brave men and women face yet another special occasion far from home, it's especially important to show our support. That's why we want to remind you that every dollar you give by midnight will be MATCHED, up to a total of $20,000, by a generous group of donors.
So please: **[Rush $29 or more before the big game kicks off to make your gift worth twice as much for our service members.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)**
[DONATE $29 -> BECOMES $58](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $58 -> BECOMES $116](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[DONATE $116 -> BECOMES $232](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/4NKwHK68-~)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER MATCHED AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/b9ZASrEz9~t8/S0gvM1VyU0FTRmowTGp1KzJYNHBPWDRneS9sSEtES1RrYXQ5WHFHZzUyS1A2c252MFo3MUJtNmVMQ21jelN3c092Zjc4cDVvRGc4TThFRjFWSFV3QStBUFZaN0RzSFJaRSs4MEY0K1pyQUE9S0/YzMwNTJHcW9ISjZlY2drUGdOZ0RNclRvMTZjeWk2bnFCMUh0czJTeEgrcmM3cVA1STNURm1vKzBCRnd2NUFwNFdlSkxDMVptcU8xOEk5SFVJRlgyalhmY3ZDZW4vOVd3S0)
---
The USO is a nonprofit organization, which means we cannot keep providing the critical programs and services our heroes rely on without your help.
Please, don't waste this opportunity to have the value of your gift go TWICE AS FAR to support programs and services such as football watch parties, phone calls with loved ones, holiday celebrations and game nights for our heroes.
One U.S. Army Lt. says of USO watch parties: "For a lot of the soldiers out here, football is the biggest connection they have to home. Our crowds get loud and proud for their teams, and for some, it's the most exciting thing they get to do in their week."
**[So, please, before you sit back to enjoy the game tonight, donate $29 or more to stand with the heroes who sacrifice so much to serve our country.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)**
Thank you for being a dedicated military supporter our service members can always count on. We hope you enjoy the game!
--The USO
*A generous group of donors is matching all gifts to the USO, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $20,000, through February 9, 2025.

[](https://www.uso.org/) [MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)

body:
| | | Y'all -- I won't waste your time: **If you wanna prevent Trump from having another four years to do whatever the heck he wants, we've gotta take back the Senate ASAP.**

And how do we do that? By making sure every Democrat's on board and ready to roll. But I just talked to the folks at the DSCC, and they said your membership hasn't been activated yet for February!

We have 'til midnight to reach our membership goal. If we fall short, defending reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and DEMOCRACY ITSELF gets that much trickier. **So I need to ask you now:**

**[Will you invest in a membership now to prevent total disaster in the future? I just heard we need 97 more activations in Pennsylvania before the midnight deadline -- so make yours count!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20998?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250209-JamesCarville-CarvilleShortMembership-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250209-JamesCarville-CarvilleShortMembership-Pros-sl1&akid=19497%2E9716520%2E5Qg_wk)**

name: Monica Crowley
subject: The Most Important Story After the Election
body:
Without a reliable press, anything can happen.
| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e7134c543f8b41bca4cbe8cb9a3c24e5&_e=rnlkruR6oHQjr0-gF0mmTgwGp2tyZg2n9aKPxe2Q2VXBllKNSKlNu-EkNK80GXyxuI1TAefaHPoPJ9mBhUx_ufHn-vZbofoalGw6y2JKmQbaENRKkcJTX1CK50oKUpm-Zu18ZBoYgKdv_E_8JfRp6dKnbywtoZQy3c_N8GroC54rcajx7lJJdilXCzeLwrSeK5VO1xKJmuZdbgQ9Qi8-rYt8m0lQ_62pjp80wOfuIxreY830tnZYO5gDPpgMCwVFSzk-WoAk4h8K_cyx6q1tIynyVP9I-N-ue3FtXrmip5AsTL8DgKvn2huWU89r7tMEoblfETJw4o2XUYOYP9YWNBIPcmVF9vzA-jfRErm_q-0fA0ErKLOLnMlRqZXl9yFWe_q5qU3L80tGyBJ4ZuY0nQPNYpDy5PrcHC4YNWOQVxo%3D)
---
|
---
# FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY
---
| | Dear Subscriber,The election is behind us and many Americans share a general sense of optimism about the future.

One of the things that still deeply concerns me, however, is the state of our press.

Without reliable newspapers fairly calling balls and strikes, anything can happen.

**It 's for this reason that the recent revival of the famed New York Sun is so vital.**
---
| | [ Join the Sun ->](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e7134c543f8b41bca4cbe8cb9a3c24e5&_e=rnlkruR6oHQjr0-gF0mmTgwGp2tyZg2n9aKPxe2Q2VXBllKNSKlNu-EkNK80GXyxuI1TAefaHPoPJ9mBhUx_ufHn-vZbofoalGw6y2JKmQbaENRKkcJTX1CK50oKUpm-Zu18ZBoYgKdv_E_8JfRp6dKnbywtoZQy3c_N8GroC54rcajx7lJJdilXCzeLwrSeK5VO1xKJmuZdbgQ9Qi8-rYt8m0lQ_62pjp80wOfuIxreY830tnZYO5gDPpgMCwVFSzk-WoAk4h8K_cyx6q1tI8Bl_WA18skS5rTxU4MC4c9u0nYf1CpBgtDogI5T8y8D2PjbtNrIlg-4e0pnph4PinfzcnJei-NVd-jYnk4oZXVabmRAjCPR6s-kaqe2VaV8twxqfw6cZbEkpau560LMr8vnXJ2JSmZCY8cfT4Jtb1w%3D)
---
| | It is a newspaper that has practiced _real_ American journalism since it first hit the streets of New York in 1833.

The Sun has only one agenda: To serve the American people and to uphold our Constitution. I am grateful to know we have the Sun in our corner.

In the other corner, though, stands the full weight of the many newspapers that have forgotten who they serve and what our country stands for -- and in some cases, are actively working against those cherished things.

The Sun can take them all on, but we need you by our side. Every person matters. For just 1¢ a day, you can join the movement to save American journalism and help restore our country.We'd be honored to have you with us. Don't wait. Please join us today.
---

clean_body: Without a reliable press, anything can happen. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF MONICA CROWLEY | | Dear Subscriber,The election is behind us and many Americans share a general sense of optimism about the future. One of the things that still deeply concerns me, however, is the state of our press. Without reliable newspapers fairly calling balls and strikes, anything can happen. It 's for this reason that the recent revival of the famed New York Sun is so vital. | | | | It is a newspaper that has practiced real American journalism since it first hit the streets of New York in 1833. The Sun has only one agenda: To serve the American people and to uphold our Constitution. I am grateful to know we have the Sun in our corner. In the other corner, though, stands the full weight of the many newspapers that have forgotten who they serve and what our country stands for -- and in some cases, are actively working against those cherished things. The Sun can take them all on, but we need you by our side. Every person matters. For just 1¢ a day, you can join the movement to save American journalism and help restore our country.We'd be honored to have you with us. Don't wait. Please join us today. | | | | I'll see you on the inside! | | | | | Monica Crowley Subscriber, The New York Sun | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States ****. ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Politics is like a football game
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
As a championship-winning coach, I understand the sacrifices and hard work it takes to win in big moments.
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=92e2bc0856a04db4befb378e46d58d18&_e=J0-bovd123KQLu0gHZhJr6xDbkXVtPKfILLxvWrS1DhpzCKeUxefFXEAhkFgVXaoAPxZoz2LA1R5lnoUuf_u1q-msbC4BOBEDWUY4VubAfIKxju5y836sHUdPdox9ZxiHOO7OhHYm87Li3pfrAolne7Sc0yEuZAWKw_XsZl8hJMr0babZQ4E12Fp6to5NJUXaF_YRYuWa3DXPN8FhaTYwCiXHhkHXJZ00rITx5fOtB_PbWwLHkSzB2VJDQ-L3NApzSNF9JqOHpDSAu073PZF5UgICRW0curi5dwLNikwU3RmYOeAtbFuQ0gNrz3zucVLLgSiy9KEJzrAZ8KrDkY3gA%3D%3D)

Team,

As a championship-winning coach, I understand the sacrifices and hard work it takes to win in big moments.

As Super Bowl LIX preparations ramp up, we should take a minute to acknowledge the time and dedication the Chiefs and Eagles put into reaching this point.

The Eagles and Chiefs have spent months of dedication, teamwork, and camaraderie to reach this point. _They have put aside their individual gains for the betterment of their team._ Nothing less than 110% of effort in every aspect could bring them to the largest stage. Now, they are playing in the biggest game of their lives.

_We can take a lot from their example --by working together, we can achieve greatness._

_**Politics is like a football game: we 're all on the same team, but sometimes, we have to fight for every yard. It's about strategy, teamwork, and making tough plays when the clock is ticking. In the end, we all want to score for America. **_

[**I 'm fighting hard every day to ensure America wins big, but I can't do it without you. Saving America is a team effort. Every single person on our team is critical to our movement. Will you help a coach out and throw a donation downfield to support my team?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=92e2bc0856a04db4befb378e46d58d18&_e=J0-bovd123KQLu0gHZhJr6xDbkXVtPKfILLxvWrS1DhpzCKeUxefFXEAhkFgVXaoAPxZoz2LA1R5lnoUuf_u1q-msbC4BOBEDWUY4VubAfIKxju5y836sHUdPdox9ZxiHOO7OhHYm87Li3pfrAolne7Sc0yEuZAWKw_XsZl8hJMr0babZQ4E12Fp6to5NJUXBC8G2gsRqwnL4OxPPsaeEbUIPrDRzepTjyhPCrHc-EpgVXNwBoy5awS8A5KgAugvlsb5DU-yKo3BGpGNeCIc16oq_d4vKTS9E4ITQIqDdLJ0you5NAQCuFNQKT7TfvdHjCmDBIbM3r3wGsC4KtmzWg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=92e2bc0856a04db4befb378e46d58d18&_e=J0-bovd123KQLu0gHZhJr6xDbkXVtPKfILLxvWrS1DhpzCKeUxefFXEAhkFgVXaoAPxZoz2LA1R5lnoUuf_u1q-msbC4BOBEDWUY4VubAfIKxju5y836sHUdPdox9ZxiHOO7OhHYm87Li3pfrAolne7Sc0yEuZAWKw_XsZl8hJMr0babZQ4E12Fp6to5NJUXx8JiUOdyTvTqBCiCnz8TtqZUvZeSfZy_RHR90S_WTq9rLT6oiZNa24hHkx2YX_XX5LlYdshYUFww9uKbf-S7Ded_jrhYs7MACdZxHhQUws_JyJyVinTjTHKl8WqZG4jyA75xPVOpnZkscTqiI8PBDQ%3D%3D)

**PREVIOUS EMAIL:** Peter, Last week, the Trump administration tried to freeze support for all federal grants and loans — an illegal action that affects everything from Medicaid and Head Start to Pell Grants and rental assistance. Many of you spoke out, and a federal judge halted the freeze. But I’ve heard from folks in the 6th District reeling from Trump’s order: Websites are not working, support groups cannot access the funds they need for payroll, and struggling families are bracing for the next drastic policy shift. name: House Republicans
subject: YOU are in charge, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
GOP leaders are gearing up for a major budget fight, and they need to know where YOU stand before decisions are made.

| | | Peter,

For too long, entrenched Washington bureaucrats have been recklessly spending YOUR hard-earned money. But now, _with our HISTORIC GOP TRIFECTA_ , we have a REAL chance to make history and finally cut spending – putting America back on the path to fiscal responsibility.

**Here’s the deal:** GOP leaders are gearing up for a major budget fight, and they need to know where YOU stand before decisions are made.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
America can’t afford more wasteful spending. Let’s send a message loud and clear that it’s time to rein in Washington’s addiction to big government.
---
[ WEIGH IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-IWphEKh3j19HjUL4CCg)
---
---
|

Let’s send a message loud and clear that it’s time to rein in Washington’s addiction to big government. | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. name: John Fetterman
subject: ive always totally been a massive 🦅 fan i swear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I ran for Senate to represent *everyone* in PA, and I guess that includes Eagles fans too. 😅
#
Derek, today’s Superbowl Sunday, so I’m *obviously* spending the day rooting for the Eagles. 🦅
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250209?refcode=em20250209-9882&refcode2=9882_434096_TJBsJS&akid=9882%2E434096%2ETJBsJS)
Anyone who knows me knows how much I love the Steelers. But I ran for Senate to represent *everyone* in PA, and I guess that includes Eagles fans too. 😅
Joking aside, I’m always stoked to cheer on PA on the national stage. I hope yinz + youse get to enjoy the game today too — because tomorrow it’s back to work!
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
[**P.S. — If you’d like to help me keep fighting for all of PA in the Senate, my campaign could use your support. If you could kick in $5 or any amount today, it would really mean a lot!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250209?refcode=em20250209-9882&refcode2=9882_434096_TJBsJS&akid=9882%2E434096%2ETJBsJS)

Friend, communities like ours are already feeling the effects of the political shift in Washington. The new administration is rolling back programs that families and seniors rely upon, and halting the infrastructure investments that have put our people back to work and rebuilt our roads, cities, and railways. The right-wing radicals in control in Congress have made it clear what their priorities are: _**cutting taxes for the super-rich while slashing programs for middle-class families.**_ Communities like Northwest Ohio — our home — have already seen too much disinvestment. The Foreign Influence Task Force was on the front lines of protecting our democracy, tracking foreign attempts to mislead voters and sow chaos in our elections. Without it, bad actors—from Russia to China—will have fewer obstacles to spreading disinformation designed to confuse voters and undermine faith in our election system.
**We know what’s coming:** **false claims, bad-faith attacks, and disinformation designed to suppress turnout and cast doubt on legitimate election results.**
We can’t afford to let our guard down. If we don’t step up now, foreign and domestic bad actors will fill the gap left by this reckless decision.
[**Let’s send a clear message: We will not allow our democracy to be undermined. Will you join me in fighting back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101838210/527222338/1491430471?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250209&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5YWUyNzUtMDhlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pDX0yIKU-Fnrn1LF6WClN-miOaNn5JqawjzmaQDB8Bo=)****
Thank you for standing with me.
— Steve

Team, My name is Gay Valimont and I’m running to replace Matt Gaetz and stop Elon Musk’s Coup that is seeking to topple the federal government. [**To help stop the coup let me ask - can you give $20, $50, or $100 today - split evenly with Seth Moulton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101839265/527225478/-26059812?refcode=250209_MFC_Gay_ElonCoup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhiNzk4Ni0wYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUGECW_jZFU5s1rAbT3b_shCSHCJ7CpUcuzv7IAslSs=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101839266/527225479/1131448904?refcode=250209_MFC_Gay_ElonCoup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhiNzk4Ni0wYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUGECW_jZFU5s1rAbT3b_shCSHCJ7CpUcuzv7IAslSs=) Musk has given his handful of teenagers and twenty-somethings unimaginable power - over you, your personal information, and virtually every corner of the federal government. He’s using these kids to reshape the government into something NOBODY voted for - and which will only serve the wealthy and well-connected. As a mom, a Democrat, and a community advocate, I know that there are REAL NEEDS in the Panhandle and all over this country that are being made worse by Elon Musk and Donald Trump. My election is April 1st and ALL OF AMERICA can send a message to Donald Trump and Speaker Mike Johnson by helping me win the seat just vacated by Matt Gaetz. Winning this seat will ultimately HELP FLIP CONTROL of the House and make sure that:
* **Elon Musk’s MAGA Nerd Coup is Stopped**
* **Attacks on Medicaid, Medicare & Social Security Are Stopped unchecked**
* **OUR PERSONAL INFORMATION Isn’t Compromised**
* **The American Government Works for ALL AMERICANS - Not South African Billionaires**

But beating Elon’s billions won’t be easy, and that’s why I’m asking: [**Can I count on you to chip in $20 - split with Seth Moulton \- to STOP Elon Musk’s coup?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101839268/527225480/-26059812?refcode=250209_MFC_Gay_ElonCoup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhiNzk4Ni0wYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUGECW_jZFU5s1rAbT3b_shCSHCJ7CpUcuzv7IAslSs=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101839269/527225481/1131448904?refcode=250209_MFC_Gay_ElonCoup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhiNzk4Ni0wYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUGECW_jZFU5s1rAbT3b_shCSHCJ7CpUcuzv7IAslSs=) If you want to send a message to Donald Trump and to the MAGA leaders in the House and Senate that we don’t want Elon Musk and a bunch of near adolescents in charge of our government and prying around in your private data, please give what you can today. In resistance,
Gay Valimont
Democrat for Florida’s 1st Congressional District [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101839270/527225482/1131448904?refcode=250209_MFC_Gay_ElonCoup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhiNzk4Ni0wYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rUGECW_jZFU5s1rAbT3b_shCSHCJ7CpUcuzv7IAslSs=)

name: Brit Eames, JanePAC
subject: My first year at JanePAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840084/527228070/1328794144?refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=&emci=728b9c77-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
Dearest Friends, I’m Brit, and I’m JanePAC’s Creative Director 👋🏻👋🏻 I’m the staffer proudly tasked with reading every _unconscionable_ executive order, summarizing them, and then designing graphics for those summaries — all so you have access to **[vetted, brief, and climate-forward synopses](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840085/527228071/-208770384?hl=en&img_index=1&refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=&emci=728b9c77-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)** of what Trump and his cronies are up to. **Well, that’s the thing I’ve been doing a lot of __lately__.** In more normal times, I run JanePAC’s social media, do our in-house graphic design, manage our in-house copywriting, and work directly with our endorsed candidates on all things creative. This week marks my one-year anniversary fighting for climate justice with JanePAC and, looking back, I'm super grateful for the incredible journey we've shared! Together, we've achieved some really remarkable things: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840086/527228072/458897881?refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=&emci=728b9c77-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
* ✅ **Over 6 million impressions:** Our message of electing climate champions at all levels of government has resonated far and wide, reaching millions across social media platforms.

* ✅ **Hundreds of thousands of engagements:** You've liked, shared, commented, and reacted, demonstrating the power of our collective voice.

* ✅ **Thousands of actions taken:** From signing petitions, to donating, to volunteering — your engagement has translated into real-world impact.

These numbers are a testament to the incredible work we've done, building community and fostering a powerful movement for our shared home 🌍 and for one another. We've had some great wins, but I want to mention (and mourn) that we lost a valuable space for organizing and connecting last year. Elon Musk’s takeover of Twitter (now known as “X”) created a hostile environment for many — in a space that was _once a vibrant hub for justice seekers._ But fear not! Jane, and I, are not deterred. I’m excited to announce our transition to **BlueSky** in 2025.
* **What is BlueSky?** It’s a decentralized social media platform that prioritizes user control, privacy, and open-source principles. It's designed to be a more equitable and inclusive space for all.
* **Why BlueSky?** We believe that it offers a safer and more empowering environment for organizations and individuals working towards justice.

**Celebrate my anniversary with me by[ _joining us on BlueSky_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840087/527228073/-855415878?refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=&emci=728b9c77-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105), and let’s continue to build a stronger, more connected climate movement — together.** With gratitude for a wonderful first year by your side, Brit 🍼 P.S. I can’t talk about this year without mentioning... I’m having my first BABY! In 2025, JanePAC is welcoming our tiniest member, and I want you to know that, for me, motherhood is maybe the most important extension of my work as an activist. This little person is my greatest reason to fight like hell, and just like Jane said after the presidential race in November: I’m going to **[hold the line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840088/527228074/189010034?hl=en&refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=&emci=728b9c77-62e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)** — _and be a mama_. Have tips and tricks for raising a climate-conscious little one? Feel free to reply to this email to share them with me!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840089/527228075/2105508926?refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101840090/527228076/2105508926?refcode=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.c74c729a-0de7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3NGM3MjlhLTBkZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UMSBfKYJeBmNO3aLvALiPZMCPWrySjliiMohAskS5Uo=)

|

clean_body: Who do you got? | = | | Friend, Today is the big game, and whether you’re backing one of the teams playing or just watching for the commercials and halftime show, one thing’s for sure: the stakes off the field are even higher, and we all have skin in the game. This administration is running trick plays left and right to roll back the progress we’ve fought for on behalf of hardworking families across the country. Having been reelected in one of the most competitive battleground states, I know a thing or two about winning—and it takes a strong team of supporters to make it happen. My elections have never been blowouts, and in 2024, it came down to the wire. It was one of the closest races in the country, and I couldn’t have crossed the goal line without the generous support of people like you. They say defense wins championships, but we can’t afford to stay on the sidelines—we need to stay on the offensive. That’s why I need your support today to make sure we’ve got the resources to execute a winning game plan when we hit the field in 2026. = | **** | **** | **= ** | **** | **= ** | **** | **= ** | **** | **= ** Your early support helps us establish a strong campaign from the very start. Hi team, it’s Brad Schneider – the Chair of the New Democrat Coalition.

**After serving in New Dem leadership for the past four years – first as Action Fund Chair and then Vice Chair for communications – I’m proud to be chosen by our our 110, center left Democrats to lead the coalition in the 119th Congress.**

I know the next two years will come with many challenges. New Dems will roll up our sleeves and are prepared to stand up to the extremism of the Republican party where necessary – and work to deliver real results for the American people whenever possible.

The work to win a Democratic House Majority starts today. New Dems are already recruiting and supporting candidates across the country to elect the pragmatic Democrats that can win across the country.

In 2024, New Dems showed how Democrats can connect with voters in blue, purple, and even red districts. While the tide flowed against Democrats nationwide, **New Dems flipped 9 seats, elected 25 candidates, and protected 20 Frontline members.** | **[CHIP IN $10 TO BECOME A NEW DEM MAJORITY MAKER SO WE CAN FLIP THE HOUSE BY 2026 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101840755/527230060/-917597963?amount=10&refcode=NDCAF_20250209_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmI4MzdhZi0wZmU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eR55WwenljZExTHUbTNitdavdwkNXx19PGF1xqAZj9A=)**

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: David Hogg
subject: Rebuilding the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Democrats need to show how we’re fighting for young folks’ futures.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250209-1&t=1&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)
Peter,
I’ve gotten a lot of questions about how Democrats can win back young voters.
We need to offer a clear economic vision for rebuilding the American Dream – one that speaks to young Americans who feel **homeownership, debt-free education, and raising a family** are still out of reach for them, _no matter how hard they work._ And most importantly we need to be ready to deliver on it. It can’t just be talk. A lot of Americans just don’t think Democrats care, understand the problems they have, or are prepared to do anything serious about it.
None of these basic necessities should be considered a luxury in the richest country on earth. We can – and must – do better. **To win young Americans back, Democrats have got to show them how we are fighting to create that future.**
Young Americans aren’t asking for a handout. They are asking for an opportunity – so that if they put in the work, they can end up being better off than their parents.
Leaders We Deserve is fighting to build that future by supporting and electing the next generation of progressive leaders. We’re putting bold young people in office who will fight for us because they understand the issues we’re facing firsthand.
We don’t have the billionaires and corporate interests on our side. But we’ve got something more powerful – we’ve got real people like you who want to make an impact on our future. Your grassroots support is the power behind all of our work.
**Together, we are changing the face of power in this country.** We’re backing the leaders who will inspire young people and fight to rebuild the American Dream.
**[If you can, please contribute $5 now to stand with us in this critical fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250209-1?refcode=em20250209-1715&amount=5&refcode2=1715_587540_g6VRNI&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250209-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250209-1715&refcode2=1715_587540_g6VRNI&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)**
Thank you!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250209-1&t=2&refcode2=1715_587540_g6VRNI&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1715%2E587540%2Eg6VRNI)

name: ELON MUSK BOMBSHELL (via Raja Krishnamoorthi)
subject: RE: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I need to pull back the curtain for a moment and explain what’s going on:

After Elon Musk dropped over $19 million [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] for Trump and his Republicans to win...

They have the slimmest House Majority in a century – and now, 3 Republican House seats are headed for expensive special elections.

Look, Peter: Winning these special elections is our final chance to put a check on Trump’s Presidency and build a Democratic firewall to block his extreme agenda. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

But unlike Trump and his allies, our Democrats aren’t relying on billionaire backers like Musk to win these crucial seats – we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to have our back. And it’s going to take all of us stepping up to compete with MAGA Republicans’ cash to win these seats from Trump and Musk. So I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise 900 donations by midnight to help Democrats win these special elections. So please, Peter: Will you chip in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thanks for your help,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?refcode=footer]
Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
Friends of Raja for Congress
PO Box 681202
Schaumburg, IL 60168
United States

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We can’t just talk the talk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Over the last three weeks we’ve seen the consequences of billionaires being allowed to spend unlimited amounts of money to tip an election.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250209-4745-footer&t=1&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)
Peter,
Over the last three weeks we’ve seen the consequences of billionaires being allowed to spend unlimited amounts of money to tip an election.
Elon Musk spent more than $290 million on the 2024 election, and now Donald Trump is allowing him to dismantle our government and sell it for parts.
**We need to return power to the people — and the only way to do that is by overturning the _Citizens United_ decision that has wrought havoc on our political system in the first place.**
[**If you’re with me in this fight, will you sign on to my petition calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/20250209-citizens-united-petition?source=em20250209-4745&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)
The second Trump administration may be taking it to a new level, but the truth is our democracy has been left vulnerable to the influence of wealthy billionaires, special interests, and corrupt Super PACs all the way since the Supreme Court’s flawed decision back in 2010.
The next time Democrats are in power, we can’t just talk the talk. We need to walk the walk and finally take action to end the corrupting influence of Big Money in our politics.
**But in order to get this done, it’s going to take a mass nationwide movement of working people who are fed up with the status quo.**
[**Peter, if you’re on board, will you add your name to my petition to demand Congress overturn _Citizens United_ and finally return power to the people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/20250209-citizens-united-petition?source=em20250209-4745&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)
**[Sign Your Name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/20250209-citizens-united-petition?source=em20250209-4745&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250209-4745-footer&t=2&refcode2=4745_420207_-w5VtE&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4745%2E420207%2E-w5VtE)

name: 1-minute poll [DOTL]
subject: Do you support Elon Musk taking over MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
10 hours left to submit

|
---
**Peter, is receiving this message because they have not completed our poll about Elon Musk’s proposed buyout of MSNBC!**

**Here’s the problem, Peter:** Trump gave Musk unrestricted access to American’s private data and the power to cut critical federal programs like Social Security.

If Elon Musk buys MSNBC, he could build a right-wing media monopoly – **giving him control of both the federal government and the media.**

We think an unelected billionaire shouldn’t have this much power in a democracy, but we need to hear from top Democrats like you:

name: Powered By People
subject: Greg Abbott is taking Texas down the wrong path
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Greg Abbott delivered his State of the State address where he outlined a plan to pass an extreme, MAGA agenda in Texas. **We must pay attention and fight back.**
At a time when we need leaders fighting for working Texans, Abbott is focused on passing a disastrous school voucher scam that will pull critically needed funds away from our public schools.
While we need to be coming together as a state, he plans to continue his anti-DEI attacks – going even further to divide us.
It’s clear that Greg Abbott is taking our state down the wrong path, which means **we need to elect Democrats at every level who will fight for a better Texas for all.**
[**Can we count on you to donate $3 or more to fuel Beto and Powered by People’s work to change Texas politics? With so much on the line, every cent counts.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250209.dEvHPb&refcode=ema20250209-239974&t=1&akid=239974%2E444211%2EBcGBkt)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250209.dEvHPb&refcode=ema20250209-239974&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239974%2E444211%2EBcGBkt)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250209-239974-footer&t=21&refcode2=239974_444211_BcGBkt&akid=239974%2E444211%2EBcGBkt)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239974%2E444211%2EBcGBkt), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team DASS
subject: Here’s the truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101844799/527243978/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTI5Y2U2ZS0xYmU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-lfpFo11emiDfc3MlTO3n_6hvAWb8zO0Kj2g4qT1to=)
Friend, Here’s the truth: Donald Trump is going to do a lot over the next four years. And most of those things will be outright ridiculous – designed to grab headlines and distract from the true harm he’s causing. We won’t waste time emailing you about every single one of his outrageous stunts designed to divide and distract us. _You’d be getting 20 emails a day if we did that..._ **Instead, we’re focused on what really matters: standing up for democracy, defending our institutions,_and electing Democratic Secretaries of State._** We’re now in a critical electoral cycle that will shape the future of our democracy. name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l90yisjucbzq1gd9ilv0j6jwvfura3cmbfmwp0pn3p5fc17bqqahwtvbd9gtyummnnatutg0fjyk2jq25t&__stmp=srfkuz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6da5ml3hw2gb45lbtltt4gywyzivdnmidkgrew0h0pspxpa9n9b5kjepqumlq4sfuhwzgn4989bk4l9odbiy8mjndlw6e5g1alswwfpdu4tdflw1gmkecq5yal5myp4hco00d8xcfykqc5m0fehta&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6da5ml3hw2gb45lbtltt4gywyjvy7v2gycdz8978zvels7kl8lif54nfiag33x28wdtc6nzb3opesnp2yv1c3jvxuasld2eoai7rrzhe4sjfomtd1ohip158ka2wvfkrma9c412pfu04ryl44cvj6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srfkuz&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
We’re targeting eight Republican Veterans in swing districts over Trump’s call for the United States to occupy Gaza
#
Peter —
VoteVets just put thousands of dollars behind our first advertising campaign of the year.
We’re running them in the Congressional districts of eight Republicans, all Veterans:
* Eli Crane: AZ 2
* Gabe Evans: CO 8
* Mariannette Miller-Meeks: IA 1
* Zach Nunn: IA 3
* John James: MI 10
* Scott Perry: PA 10
* Jen Kiggans: VA 2
* Derrick Van Orden: WI 3

We’re using them to mobilize their constituents and direct them to call and write to demand that they stand against Trump’s calls for the United States to occupy Gaza.
We just finished the longest wars in our nation’s history. We’ll be dealing with the fallout from the War on Terror for the rest of our lives, and VoteVets will not stand by as Trump looks to send American Troops overseas to “nation-build” in Gaza.
VoteVets was founded because our “leaders” lied us into preventable wars and got a bunch of our friends killed. We’re going to do everything we can to prevent another generation of American Troops from suffering the same fate.
This is the core of our mission, and we’re asking you to chip in to help us keep these ads running.
**[Make a donation of $5 and help us keep the GOPs feet to the fire as Trump attempts to drag American Troops into another needless conflict. Anything helps. body:
Receive instant info directly on your phone. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=4211cceed9&e=5c740fa3e2)

|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3988f4085e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**ANNOUNCING GFI'S TEXT SERVICE!
INSTANT COMMUNICATION & INFORMATION
DELIVERED DIRECTLY TO YOUR PHONE!**

---
| **👊 Join the Text Movement**!

Exciting news! Today we are publicly announcing the Grassroots Freedom Initiative's (GFI's) new **text information service**. It will allow us to instantly communicate important & urgent broadcasts to you, as well as regular alerts when we publish new content **so you don't miss a thing**!

To **get on the list** to receive our texts, please **text "JOIN" To 833-935-4657**. That's also the number from which you'll receive our texts, so please put it in your contacts & "white list" our number if you use text spam filtering.

That's all you need to do!

Remember, we’re not here to tell Ohioans **what** to think. We’re here to **empower them with the truth** —because we believe **informed voters make the best decisions** for their families, communities, and our great state.

✅ **Follow our platforms (see last week's email[HERE)](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8d3c13bf6e&e=5c740fa3e2).**
✅ **Share this email.**
✅ **Help us reach 280,000 Ohioans!**

The **fight for truth in Ohio starts TODAY!** Let’s do this—together.

**Thank you for being part of the movement!**

**– Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI)**
---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|

**Mark Pukita

mark@gfiohio.com

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Reflecting on Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
As we celebrate this rich history, this month also invites us to reflect on the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=2Q51yqWmtzhxqUODfAca86%2ByUagZ8X3nb35Dcu1RnuV48Pp2KYeqkMC%2FuI1mMdhFgOFApLbf6h96ielw8LYctSzBuEU0Gy1ux6gDEXB62Jl%2FLkDnZ1nEVVsUYN8vvxyOpnhzss%2B5r0piPzH62bfQqUT0UetINbVj7iLM2V0LA%2BnSHHxIXp4ReQiJ1nJcz4ZveTQdyps1gqlXeDlBnw836KFtviMFb%2BOnx%2BiaCH4ZQHtqZDVjC5P3zZ64wLBYuivnGQZIk8GKrKNxM%2F6V1iRwVNB%2BbBe0pqfi7j6UWec05JTzR9WTcdD5pW4S%2F%2FIm61TVhJLB9Huda1uaReQQJHRd%2BVRIkFkQfulklPnplXfwdW%2BHuvv%2Bc3k6eNabjpAVXdDIa40zWa0p9Da%2BUE%2FGdNyzDLRXI0RiWUtN%2BOv9R0ck3iU%3D)

---
Peter,

February 1st marked the start of Black History Month, and 65 years since the Greensboro Four began their sit-ins at the Woolworth’s counter.

As we celebrate this rich history, this month also invites us to reflect on the work still ahead of us to achieve racial justice and true equity in our nation.

I grew up during segregation in North Carolina, Peter. When we went to the grocery store, we were taught not to look directly at a white person. I remember not being able to eat at the lunch counter at Big John’s, and going to the backdoor of Leo’s restaurant to pick up BBQ sandwiches — because we weren’t allowed in the dining room.

Segregation was not officially outlawed until 1964, when I was in grade school. I wouldn’t attend a desegregated school until I was 13. **The progress we have made in just my lifetime is astounding.**

**But there is still SO much more to be done.**

So as we celebrate Black History month, I hope you will take some time to reflect on how much change can be made in a generation, and how much more can be made in the next.

Onward,

Valerie Foushee

name: Dayna Colbert
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This February we once again celebrate the tremendous contributions of Black Hoosiers to our state and country during Black History Month. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101845251/527245731/1514584251?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDM3NGI4Ny0xZWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lETyAA43c1zVGn5rTvU6tZe_W2Ey-zvkP_9bakdhIdo=)
These are uncharted times, Peter. The nation’s loudest anti-vaxxer will be in charge of our health. With the party-line vote out of committee, the least-qualified person to lead the most-advanced health science organization is on his way to becoming the head of the Department of Health and Human Services. Our truths have been compromised. And these hearings have roundly confirmed that we can’t trust any messaging that comes out of HHS over these next years. God forbid, if another pandemic hits in the near future, can we trust that we’ll actually be informed? Is there anything this man has said that makes us believe we can trust him with our lives? **Now more than ever, we need folks who will give you the straight talk.** That means that we, the scientific community, have to take up the mantle for truth. And it makes it so much more important that we have scientific communicators in elected office so that we can speak truth to power and call it out, even when the barrage of lies feels exhausting. I’m doing everything I can to defend our Frontline seat and take back the House so we can have a pro-science Congress that actually helps the people who need it. And I could use your help: [**Can you make an $3 donation today to help us protect science and fact in Congress? | | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/0Te_RS3b3aEtJROkxCn-S75OKXCMlNBEH88rXev9Nr7h1B4FDUUVpxOb4cJYbLZs6-40PEbM4yT7l0Y48cNduVTTzU_ww4FLP01RFwknYmqHlBmqKt1nSCNQOTYXplhvEEFzQM3cjMhiLZWOV7O4choPmXwgSN7ck7wYjxa5yf9DBf2Lu1NPyjrqJ0tza8TfPKzW6sPh1kGJDiNZfifSb-PmHYt_Xn-RP797mt7R8mgxHyC1ThU1RIz-8MBkBMF252mEJpizeaqUGu_P0y3Lpo76j8pmOjNNFol3JkvMf6B5UDS_CE0ns-GT6THfrx-oL1KvN7EBMnlwUoLTOgM7JXvCje4b7vmyV2PgOBlS_qGhI9DNM-J8Dytvbj9t85XyVCtgkXXtv7U_CQkpxsqRN9cdotrd6fVCMlg86D7uPE9ItuKZ5he053Icmktlkf-CdwtQ1Hn0ddFGbV11krkOGplT-nIIygjzFAlE1qWFbo4/_dFT0j-w4lNk3WQN5TCx2BX0e0bncgPl/5)" which you can now own on DVD.

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/yQ-PpxU1xE6ASh7nF_en-lwWKgb835RDVA2_7LjfUYisfKOrzX1RAnGhdZ3atiL5Ja2W4tyQn2g5XQB1aBWRKN4KW6Xe-kbgDqWfTjJmjSulfjvMgnc4CQxvovCK_XAC6umnoYxYLWbWN-YOVDujBs8GjYPU5g8cwqcU2opeMiui5RfB3ZFtDzScCOa7-pM5aHsCVMsWgOxV1vO3lVblMIg2eiq0URcO9-UFFZa3Bnolot-YLsGkEz-UKWVFgIxKJ6_8NLN9z5PLMOtVgJwa4MvsMXoKlSyGDeRmXiCX4zoCP0IHek0K28n69naXnid8F4R5j8AX3IirmrK4ojPWUTDVEwg2R7ZVmes1HgbhxUHwSN-T0fYzTkmkrfxmBa6c1SDLxS6DY_m_xQPKR0z36RoyHI0vOY4p4XAlj9mrd8RGYBdI16CcWzIv08qgDdaZB9feyAyXmDfebRYcGBuRiLoo6nlMQU_YJb9rcoNPirI/9e8jjT6PT2LAYO7Tq7LGzelZfOu3-KlP/5).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=aodRe73Xj2t3mmQFpm2NYLszbkTw0hUAcUjfRYbYJLWOb6iFIMYWmg3fHAgZd6%2BsMGx20%2Bk9QUnerJLF%2FdTWIgwRnVHoevlzOBYy2JOH3oqYagwrlV%2Fw%2BgDNANMtXfwnpjqcMOHcRonStpwoJIf0vsLneELoKQBiQbquIgDHHst%2Fzshj23Nr10J7B1mr5JZOTPXwn%2BZvG%2FcVwYucntZaPWNTXE8yk0QMP0NUSWxmKyhqqzn%2BnkP8WHuP8SL9I%2B%2BxafPD%2Fvav%2B%2Bma%2FHvnTzjgqJ4JtpMb3XvHiwO2Am%2B%2B97Yjbwb7PPmIFOXK7JzhU6ii%2B8gpfEqjTi4gZyLGpkg5NYWM7pe6TEWPBoxzc0b1YSHTk9C3LabS%2BZgJU5e%2BWV4MFY1GxFfrJeqSs5hsFHjWJ3%2BAT4kC8aBhfREcQppZKsI%3D)

| _“While Democrats at the Presidential level have consistently lost ground with working class voters for over the last decade, House Democrats like...Gabe Vasquez continue to overperform with this crucial bloc of voters.**Their victories demonstrate that House Democrats can win back this coalition of voters...”**_

— House Majority PAC
---
Saludos, it's Gabe Vasquez.
Right now, House Republicans hold one of the slimmest House majorities in history. They know they’ll have to fight tooth and nail to keep it, so they’re already gearing up to spend big in 2026.
In 2024, we held NM-02 blue despite Trump winning this district at the top of the ticket. **Unfortunately, winning against all odds has put a target on our back.**
Republicans AND Democrats nationwide know that this team has what it takes to fight back against MAGA extremism and win. [We have to keep this momentum going, folks. Will you chip in to support my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101846594/527250449/646161803?amount=10&source=SBD_VASQUEZ_FR_020825_1_1_HMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODI0ODk2OS0yM2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRoHBmmOzF3kk_9aT-6gjLVfbRMtgcZu6Zkg75L6GKM=)

Republicans have already made it clear that they will be targeting Trump-won districts in the next election. It may seem far away, but with the chaos we’ve seen in the first two weeks of Trump’s second presidency, we have to build up our resources NOW.
We’ve proven that we can win a tough race in a Trump-won district, and in 2026, NM-02 will be the frontline for Democrats’ efforts to win back the House majority. Now is the time to prove that our grassroots team is stronger than ever and ready to take on anything MAGA Republicans throw our way.
[Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can today to ensure our movement is stronger than ever and help Democrats flip the House blue and issue a critical check on Trump’s power in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101846596/527250451/646161803?amount=10&source=SBD_VASQUEZ_FR_020825_1_1_HMP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODI0ODk2OS0yM2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dRoHBmmOzF3kk_9aT-6gjLVfbRMtgcZu6Zkg75L6GKM=)

name: Team Tina
subject: We cannot allow Trump’s chaos to distract us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The time to stand up for our rights is now. |
#
Folks, Donald Trump’s actions in his first few weeks are wreaking havoc across the country, and it feels like we can’t catch a break. He’s blocking bipartisan, congressionally approved funding, jeopardizing healthcare access for millions, and even trying to end birthright citizenship — all to create chaos and distract from the real work that needs to be done. **We cannot afford to let these extremist, illegal actions stand.** Tina Smith is working tirelessly to push back against Trump’s attacks on our nation’s values. She’s long been a fierce advocate for protecting healthcare, defending immigrants’ rights, and ensuring every American has access to the opportunities they deserve. The fight to protect our freedoms and our future won’t be easy. We can’t let Donald Trump and his extremist agenda derail the progress we’ve made. **Will you support Tina in her fight to keep Trump’s chaos in check and make sure our government works for all Americans? name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Glenn Youngkin at the White House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Let’s be clear: getting rid of the Department of Education would be detrimental to Virginia’s public education system.

| **Just 24 hours after our Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin tweeted this, it became clear from multiple reports that Donald Trump is moving toward abolishing the Department of Education:**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101846791/527251113/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY5Nzg3YzktMjVlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tQKGWgmYxUrbxEHnxhEMXQ8h88V9JMsq5vcCFtivrm0=)
Does Governor Glenn Youngkin, who has aligned himself with Donald Trump and his dangerous agenda, _**seriously**_ think that Donald Trump is strengthening our schools?

**Let’s be clear: getting rid of the Department of Education would be detrimental to Virginia’s public education system.** Federal funding for education would be slashed, and rural school districts would lose vital resources for teachers, students, and special education programs.

This is going to hurt every classroom in our Commonwealth, every parent, every student, and every teacher who relies on strong public schools to prepare the next generation for success. It’s like taking a wrecking ball to Virginia’s public schools and leaving our educators to deal with the clean up. I’ve always worked to protect and improve our schools, and your support can help us make sure Virginia remains a place where every child has access to the quality education they deserve—regardless of their background or zip code.
