clean_body: Let’s be clear: getting rid of the Department of Education would be detrimental to Virginia’s public education system. | Just 24 hours after our Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin tweeted this, it became clear from multiple reports that Donald Trump is moving toward abolishing the Department of Education: = Does Governor Glenn Youngkin, who has aligned himself with Donald Trump and his dangerous agenda, seriously think that Donald Trump is strengthening our schools? Let’s be clear: getting rid of the Department of Education would be detrimental to Virginia’s public education system. Federal funding for education would be slashed, and rural school districts would lose vital resources for teachers, students, and special education programs. This is going to hurt every classroom in our Commonwealth, every parent, every student, and every teacher who relies on strong public schools to prepare the next generation for success. It’s like taking a wrecking ball to Virginia’s public schools and leaving our educators to deal with the clean up. I’ve always worked to protect and improve our schools, and your support can help us make sure Virginia remains a place where every child has access to the quality education they deserve—regardless of their background or zip code. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4fec6ee68cd94b0c9b7117cd041b149b&_e=OfT3Ydjavj98UiEIY57PZck962GvHgEmyS0X_JOhDcvaKyx583Hge2YWk6Xz2xxttol5PyJCv-q7PNWT0Lw9k2wsv3MAO4CKyxoOTuOFTbIYxL6eQMnR6MeLfcRa935qpLJ7rnoDJzS7L2AgiglVvoLmE-BEfFKp9Bi9Jz0wl1VteRmgVPek8wcwm7OzPSbkf0dW2i6Jnm4vTUuijv7lx6ICWYTwTf-3VbPFYsYa_1JqN6_5-dTa8BXrJzROmE4_BOsGD-4LnaCrkaoIxwWpR4x4Clvm72PEUs5S_9dQ7SPHW0t2UiwKnzK-9uFdKE3TAoqxHIHZ0TcXUzVt72qYe3AWZsnfbceY-AXjdwOjLMg5yETGmkOrsc8rYP6Gy2qs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4fec6ee68cd94b0c9b7117cd041b149b&_e=OfT3Ydjavj98UiEIY57PZck962GvHgEmyS0X_JOhDcvaKyx583Hge2YWk6Xz2xxttol5PyJCv-q7PNWT0Lw9k2wsv3MAO4CKyxoOTuOFTbIYxL6eQMnR6MeLfcRa935qpLJ7rnoDJzS7L2AgiglVvoLmE-BEfFKp9Bi9Jz0wl1VteRmgVPek8wcwm7OzPSbkf0dW2i6Jnm4vTUuijv7lx6ICWYTwTf-3VbPFYsYa_1Ity6YC7o2UsYkFhT64ZuE86kxX7dbQkt5goMqw4VGxeXrXAfNNCcWjxZlM1WT96d2AyYJpJj3eSluF2CB1Oz59JC1XiY8e37dsbapo2nupPpCjxLZ0p7qSkJvd_sRdSrML-4unvyXaQC8zyPQaOcxX)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4fec6ee68cd94b0c9b7117cd041b149b&_e=OfT3Ydjavj98UiEIY57PZck962GvHgEmyS0X_JOhDcvaKyx583Hge2YWk6Xz2xxttol5PyJCv-q7PNWT0Lw9k2wsv3MAO4CKyxoOTuOFTbIYxL6eQMnR6MeLfcRa935qpLJ7rnoDJzS7L2AgiglVvoLmE-BEfFKp9Bi9Jz0wl1VteRmgVPek8wcwm7OzPSbkf0dW2i6Jnm4vTUuijv7lx6ICWYTwTf-3VbPFYsYa_1JG-opBM_mjh10rROgacwLdJ9SSb1ceMuOSQAtMshEmnRMR0HGrxcCB5i_42YWNAhlcokYicPQFT8me9UTjVHgaYjpupw_9rYbwy1pY2YLtzAV1USUNsngMgmDcpsUHwQBfzpEY7GE_BBFRVinypWDK) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4fec6ee68cd94b0c9b7117cd041b149b&_e=OfT3Ydjavj98UiEIY57PZck962GvHgEmyS0X_JOhDcvaKyx583Hge2YWk6Xz2xxttol5PyJCv-q7PNWT0Lw9k2wsv3MAO4CKyxoOTuOFTbIYxL6eQMnR6MeLfcRa935qpLJ7rnoDJzS7L2AgiglVvoLmE-BEfFKp9Bi9Jz0wl1VteRmgVPek8wcwm7OzPSbkf0dW2i6Jnm4vTUuijv7lx6ICWYTwTf-3VbPFYsYa_1In8uKiRUlB-kwhSJemSXR0MxEE9Rtt0c0uJYSmwIKqrrraMcL2fMpgYlzoHfTkdOItOmOy5javJ_3tt4xhEUmKygdKV-vlXY0KsjJMMfKDuZS5r_ksnPwMiB0YDfrkiBiqAG5M3MfTa0N3Qqa9nhkQ)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4fec6ee68cd94b0c9b7117cd041b149b&_e=OfT3Ydjavj98UiEIY57PZck962GvHgEmyS0X_JOhDcvaKyx583Hge2YWk6Xz2xxttol5PyJCv-q7PNWT0Lw9k2wsv3MAO4CKyxoOTuOFTbIYxL6eQMnR6MeLfcRa935qpLJ7rnoDJzS7L2AgiglVvoLmE-BEfFKp9Bi9Jz0wl1VteRmgVPek8wcwm7OzPSbkf0dW2i6Jnm4vTUuijv7lx6ICWYTwTf-3VbPFYsYa_1JHcQkNUZVTxtC1sp7mFnRvJrby8oJvZ2njXqjH9zgPDWVe7DQBW_hEeeifH7IjFGejinZDPM-QuJZs-s4xr1CrZDAy5vUI_2LcpFow19F0uXbvoeKkzhm34on1nnKXRcyDgEQLMDBJ8DPKrUbxBMBi)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Three things you can do right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
#
Peter,
Sometimes, when the chaos seems overwhelming and the news feels scary, the best thing you can do is slow down. Then, when you’re ready, move with purpose.
Here are three ways you can take meaningful action today:
1. **Take care of yourself.** You can’t pour from an empty cup — and in a time when we need to band together and show strength, self-care has never been more important.
2. **Make your voice heard.** Choose an issue close to your heart and call your elected leaders about it. Whether it’s your city council member, your state legislator, or one of your congresspeople, this is one of the most direct and meaningful actions you can take to communicate your concerns and priorities. **[Learn more about how to do that by clicking here.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85718?t=1&akid=8756%2E614464%2EkCBIZ2)**
3. **Donate to Heartland Patriots.** Over the next election cycle and beyond, we need to elect leaders at all levels to fight back against corruption and restore power to working people. And Heartland Patriots is dedicated to supporting candidates in red and blue states across the country who are committed to doing exactly that.

name: Kotek HQ
subject: A Budget for Oregon’s Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Together, We Can Make Oregon a Place Where Everyone Thrives |
#
---
Peter, Even as we respond to all the news coming out of Washington, DC, Tina is committed to making real progress right here in Oregon on the issues that matter most. She’s already outlined her vision in her recommended state budget for the next two years, working towards a future where: 🏡 **No one has to live on the streets.** Tina’s budget includes critical investments to address the housing and homelessness crises head-on, so we can ensure everyone has a safe place to call home. 🧑⚕️ **Everyone has access to affordable healthcare.** With a focus on expanding mental health and substance abuse treatment, Tina’s budget strives to ensure that everyone can get the care they need, no matter where they live. 📚 **Every child has access to a high-quality education.** Tina’s budget will make record investments in Oregon schools to ensure every child has the tools and resources to thrive. 🏛️ **Our values are protected.** The budget includes funding for initiatives that protect reproductive rights, the environment, immigrants, and civil rights, reflecting Tina’s commitment to defend Oregon values. **This budget isn’t just a set of arbitrary numbers — name: Andy Biggs
subject: Andy Biggs for Governor!
body:
Good evening!

You may have seen that Andy Biggs recently announced he is running for Governor of Arizona in 2026! We are so grateful for the overwhelming support of his run.

But first things first - _we need your help to get him on the ballot!_

**Arizona voters can[click here ](https://go.azsos.gov/2ff8)to sign his ballot petition! **Please feel free to share the link with your friends and family. The more the merrier!

If you would like to support the campaign financially, you can [donate here](https://secure.anedot.com/biggs-for-arizona/biggsforarizona).

To stay up to date on endorsements and other news, follow Andy Biggs on [X](https://x.com/andybiggs4az), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/biggsforcongress), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/andybiggsaz/)!

We look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail. Thank you for your support!

\- Team Biggs

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan fights harder for Trump’s cronies than Ohioans
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
I want you to picture this:
Jim Jordan, sitting at a desk, earnestly putting pen to paper—not to draft a single bill to help Ohioans, not to fight for better jobs or lower healthcare costs, but to gush about Kash Patel in Newsweek.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250209_jordan_patel_image [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250209_jordan_patel_image]
Jim Jordan, the ultimate ULTRA-MAGA lapdog, spent actual time writing an op-ed begging the Senate to confirm Kash Patel as the next FBI Director .
Let’s talk about Kash Patel.
This is a guy who was one of Trump’s key enablers in trying to overturn the 2020 election, pushing conspiracy theories and shielding Trump from accountability at every turn.
He played a direct role in spreading lies about the Russia investigation and was conveniently installed at the Department of Defense right before January 6th–just in time to set the stage for the chaos that followed.
And now, Jim Jordan wants to hand him the most powerful law enforcement agency in the country like it’s some kind of prize for loyalty?
We don’t have time for this clown show. We need real leadership, not a circus. That’s why our movement is committed to removing Jim Jordan from of Congress once and for all. Will you chip in $25 today to fuel this fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250209_jordan_patel_link1]
This is the kind of delusional nonsense Jordan wastes his time on instead of doing his job.
Eighteen years in Congress and he’s never passed a single bill. Not one. But when it comes to conspiracy theories and power grabs, he’s first in line.
Jordan doesn’t actually care about “fixing” the FBI.
He just wants a political lackey who will do Trump’s bidding, target his enemies, and rewrite history. That’s what this is really about.
Jordan whines about “abuses of power” while actively working to dismantle any system that could hold Trump and his cronies accountable.
He cries about “politicization” while trying to install a political operative as the head of our nation’s top law enforcement agency.
Jim Jordan doesn’t fight for America.
He doesn’t fight for democracy. He fights for Trump, for himself, and for the most extreme corners of MAGA world.
It’s embarrassing. It’s reckless. And if we don’t fight back now, it will only get worse.
Our movement is committed to taking down Jim Jordan. Will you chip in now to fuel our fight against Jim Jordan and his ULTRA- MAGA circus? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250209_jordan_patel_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1bd29c4ece214896bfffed9cdba815a2&_e=r0MZn3d3J4h-Jauf8-g8bYG9Nfp4Tt7xrQE1faOEDdPcXRuQKxoKqoJdWEtHLGRI1ZpED_8jliP2pPuSRhQvLUBE8hMVW9DgKfIJrVJCC9k1Jgpqucuz40DYFmXXFH7p2jKjbYqu4SuSevvWIYlTc15Z_-rqPuIjIWYPlm_22oCDxskTyI7BSWWrijAlkebWgOMyMAimqtTK53L7zO0ERp_H796sPBEEumdgoPYdt7kGh96IemDlBKY4oliSbqY7SC6LzgfJbGcKgiyUkgqsqi14Nztxf7qnSwQYaFYpYMKsowP3TWAysr0zMksbc02IYsZKmjbPhd_Dn7_53Rjl6HY8THeonfDHP5Nq-yqvR6YhGEhsYi3PhhEQRo3DLwGEygCF4OrlxADBBYwjgR7CxQ%3D%3D)

---
| |
---
| BILLS COMING UP MONDAY BY COMMITTEE CLICK THE LINKS BELOW FOR FULL LISTING OF ALL BILLS COMING UP TOMORROW
---
| [Courts of Justice Bills](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg7lT7nZ1ghD9ikVDUIyW8kGxYEHFYDjRhXyJYk9kTvQ5zTxMfXJBHWOooH3X-A8m2YecTuCaCv-a9Ksq_JwytXrLeqvzx9octYBWLTOrwDNphDmAL5keSTanr5k51WP0eQhmw1rDNIRXly9o8Uq4gSQ6Rd-JpaNK_-ypxP-5e48rBCgvTmBW5-g==&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==)
---
[HB1597 \- Firearms; secure storage, penalties.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgVu6WITzRvKq0xk8ZcjOxc8zdrUn0kKjWsWelVGVG7-tYUKNQrCPSfjc7TE5GD3RTrYUuKY8HvYWOEaU5ey2OUHiyOcn_Ej5pYZa5atyiUYA8UebUpjhvJAL8qERzd7-4&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Feggans Secure storage of firearms; penalties. Creates a Class 4 misdemeanor for any person who fails to securely store a firearm on any premises where such person knows, or reasonably should know, that a minor or a person who is prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is, or is likely to be, present.
The bill increases the penalty to a Class 1 misdemeanor if a minor or a person who is prohibited by law from possessing a firearm obtains such firearm.
The bill includes certain exceptions and requires firearms dealers to post a notice stating firearm storage requirements and the penalty for improperly storing such firearms.
The bill also creates a Class 4 misdemeanor for any person who fails to report to law enforcement the theft or loss of a firearm from a vehicle and a Class 1 misdemeanor if another person obtains such firearm.
Finally, the bill requires the Superintendent of State Police, in conjunction with the Commissioner of Health, to create a public awareness campaign on the importance of the secure storage of firearms by January 1, 2026

### [HB1607 Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalties](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgYxXUclxfe7WaF4TL1oYydn0NIMP2DMd_C_ztFS8qlH6Q9Dv667e-r99yoaWN3PqQQTvvTYo08_TkH6AeL-C_qhiBOhcF60UFqBalVkzH0zIQvmj5GgQjxg3jNtlNT_M3&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==)
Patron: [Dan I. Helmer (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg2kEisNdSzsJRE8E_4XyRKP55ZTa1CHQeKZ97LX3awDL2AWW4jbDqmB7QYR1z3EgVnIr-aGRxFsvIPwOgd9vE1H0gWnKdhyPURY5sJWN1u4VsZ4bGzIu3MEW1b1JRblAO41MT-P5m-YF-ELvSVG6nDGoUB8NhyIewwBkJUBjOpYPdjDHjzEqGBQ==&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Purchase, sale, transfer, etc., of assault firearms and certain ammunition feeding devices prohibited; penalties. Creates a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person who imports, sells, manufactures, purchases, or transfers an assault firearm, as that term is defined in the bill, and prohibits a person who has been convicted of such violation from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm for a period of three years from the date of conviction.
The bill provides that an assault firearm does not include any firearm that is an antique firearm, has been rendered permanently inoperable, is manually operated by bolt, pump, lever, or slide action, or was manufactured before July 1, 2025.
The bill also prohibits the sale of a large capacity ammunition feeding device, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill provides that any person who willfully and intentionally (i) sells an assault firearm to another person or (ii) purchases an assault firearm from another person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and that any person who imports, sells, barters, or transfers a large capacity ammunition feeding device is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor.
The bill also makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person younger than 21 years of age to import, sell, manufacture, purchase, possess, transport, or transfer an assault firearm regardless of the date of manufacture of such assault firearm.
[HB1608 \- Firearm industry members; standards of responsible conduct; civil liability.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg5L6Yw_RsSPZEiQbN3qHtRE2pBuLTEmJPJyqMs72IPdMk24CYbpGcdg0uCP-6nwtGpW3ZG8mA3e74UfXaphFEkcNMzwCxUz_05cgfpWFJbtWLiS1ID9agQ8tm2tJ0QZHK&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Helmer Firearm industry members; standards of responsible conduct; civil liability. Creates standards of responsible conduct for firearm industry members and requires such members to establish and implement reasonable controls regarding the manufacture, sale, distribution, use, and marketing of the firearm industry member's firearm-related products, as those terms are defined in the bill.
Such reasonable controls include reasonable procedures, safeguards, and business practices that are designed to:
(i) prevent the sale or distribution of a firearm-related product to a straw purchaser, a firearm trafficker, a person prohibited from possessing a firearm under state or federal law, or a person who the firearm industry member has reasonable cause to believe is at substantial risk of using a firearm-related product to harm themselves or unlawfully harm another or of unlawfully possessing or using a firearm-related product;
(ii) prevent the loss of a firearm-related product or theft of a firearm-related product from a firearm industry member;
(iii) ensure that the firearm industry member complies with all provisions of state and federal law and does not otherwise promote the unlawful manufacture, sale, possession, marketing, or use of a firearm-related product; and
(iv) ensure that the firearm industry member does not engage in an act or practice in violation of the Virginia Consumer Protection Act.
The bill also provides that a firearm industry member may not knowingly or recklessly create, maintain, or contribute to a public nuisance, as defined in the bill, through the sale, manufacturing, importing, or marketing of a firearm-related product.
The bill creates a civil cause of action for the Attorney General or a local county or city attorney to enforce the provisions of the bill or for any person who has been injured as a result of a firearm industry member's violation to seek an injunction and to recover costs and damages
[HB1622 \- Firearm in unattended motor vehicle; civil penalty.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgrY9jgL0eUxfJxV5nKJbRPJbA4ct5q3dE-Db_PpHQLklmtILaMFkWd9W4aEOpaN6SfmI1oId1Q_VpUhBOfZnEg_GLHF0Kr-ypwd3ti1N73D0hsh9vUcvs6P7x_KGOwXyI&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Laufer Firearm in unattended motor vehicle; civil penalty. Provides that no person shall leave, place, or store a handgun in an unattended motor vehicle, as defined in the bill, when such handgun is visible to any person who is outside such unattended motor vehicle. The bill provides that any person violating such prohibition is subject to a civil penalty of no more than $500 and that such unattended motor vehicle may be subject to removal for safekeeping.
[HB1660 \- Trigger activator definition; penalty.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg4TO0PIwlGHRMY7L936Rp6zduubtMb4iyoTijU943L8sW3FHa3pWuWbK8X2OX2ayXV5svcj_W1U3oTTi-frJS1yY6EVOuKETG_ypZFd6eDJnh71K6H4-63PWzFHRVrhLd&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Jones Trigger activator definition; penalty. Defines "trigger activator" as a conversion kit, tool, accessory, or device designed to alter the rate of fire of a semi-automatic firearm to mimic automatic weapon fire or used to increase the rate of fire to a rate faster than such semi-automatic firearm not equipped with a conversion kit, tool, accessory, or device.
[HB1736 \- Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention, Va. Center for; created, etc.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgG6pD6F0XzhOHfdOO-00xU2hNdytR3sTR_v62Kqd4U0oCQaqJsAlPoCC0u1npV09y7X2RhcYiqvP-BPvZYUpLXZ_hOCDSar9ZuUS_QrrohjJWe7yH7dctu9FkeBNdlJEQ&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Price Virginia Center for Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention; Virginia Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention Fund; creation. Creates the Virginia Center for Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention within the Department of Criminal Justice Services.
Establishes the Virginia Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention Fund, to be administered by the Virginia Center for Firearm Violence Intervention and Prevention, to replace the existing Virginia Gun Violence Intervention and Prevention Fund that is administered by the Department.
[HB1797 \- Concealed handgun permits; reciprocity with other states.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgG6pD6F0XzhOHfdOO-00xU2hNdytR3sTR_v62Kqd4U0oCQaqJsAlPoCC0u1npV09y7X2RhcYiqvP-BPvZYUpLXZ_hOCDSar9ZuUS_QrrohjJWe7yH7dctu9FkeBNdlJEQ&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Helmer Concealed handgun permits; reciprocity with other states. Provides that the Superintendent of State Police, in consultation with the Office of the Attorney General, shall determine whether states meet the statutory qualifications for Virginia to recognize the concealed handgun permit of a person from another state. Under current law, any out-of-state permit is recognized in the Commonwealth provided that
(i) the issuing authority provides the means for instantaneous verification of the validity of all such permits or licenses issued within that state, accessible 24 hours a day;
(ii) the permit or license holder carries a photo identification issued by a government agency of any state or by the U.S. Department of Defense or U.S. Department of State and displays the permit or license and such identification upon demand by a law-enforcement officer; and
(iii) the permit or license holder has not previously had a Virginia concealed handgun permit revoked. The bill prevents a Virginia resident, except for an active duty service member or such service member's spouse, who has not been issued a valid resident concealed handgun permit from using a concealed handgun or concealed weapon permit or license issued by another state to carry a concealed handgun in the Commonwealth.
The bill requires the Superintendent of State Police, in consultation with the Office of the Attorney General, to review any agreements for reciprocal recognition that are in place with any other states as of July 1, 2025, to determine whether the requirements and qualifications of those states' laws are adequate to prevent possession of a permit or license by persons who would be denied a permit in the Commonwealth and revoke any reciprocity agreement or recognition of any states that do not meet such requirements or qualifications by December 1, 2025.
The bill requires the Attorney General to provide a written explanation for any determination that a state's laws are adequate to prevent possession of such permit or license by persons who would be denied such permit in the Commonwealth.
[HB1869 \- Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm; assault and battery of a family or household member or intimate partner; penalties.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgcdblEVz7i6H-89XliAYmxRtFK1rppvMZ3Ikt6FSx3zxaDTYmHkLxJLQdce9ob0xg2_APjzJbvwYMo5F_EbiB1JjMcCJKToWHgKCtwPk5CR6Lvotz6qDkHW8e1pdD2ady&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: McClure Purchase, possession, or transportation of firearm; assault and battery of a family or household member or intimate partner; penalties. Adds to the definition of "family or household member," as such definition relates to juvenile and domestic relations district court, a person's intimate partner, defined in the bill as an individual who, within the previous 12 months, was in a romantic, dating, or sexual relationship with the person. The bill also adds to the definition of "family or household member," as such definition relates to a person's purchase, possession, or transportation of a firearm following an assault and battery of a family or household member, any individual who cohabits or who, within the previous 12 months, cohabitated with the person. Finally, the bill provides that any person who knowingly and intentionally purchases, possesses, or transports any firearm following a misdemeanor conviction for an offense that occurred on or after July 1, 2025, for the offense of assault and battery against an intimate partner or an offense substantially similar under the laws of any other state or of the United States is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor.

[HB1876 \- Capitol Sq. or building owned/leased by the Commonwealth, carrying firearm/explosive material, etc.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgsUfE5px4A7MFQ-KW3aazr0cZG0YZilfd41KTd1TYlSTgP2O6VZKCqj2mZGImLzJtxWmWsrUW2jZpyNEgAQbztDeUScIoRZdYL2Pd3dnr3rW6uRPV9_Lhc98I3LoLBUQk&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Callsen Carrying a firearm or explosive material within Capitol Square or building owned or leased by the Commonwealth; exemptions; public institutions of higher education; penalty. Permits the governing board of a public institution of higher education to adopt a policy prohibiting the carrying of any firearm, ammunition, or components or combination thereof within any building owned or operated by such public institution of higher education. Finally, the bill exempts certain activities, defined in the bill, operated at public or private institutions of higher education from any policy created by a governing board.
[HB1960 \- Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgh0bSY_2k0I2dHnz7JtVMVXLePaTt3_wJkUzgbB7ONjg28dADMBrN20PuCoRaTaKz4ppVwPHNj9dTyzyc5P8hv2coC6Ikj_AMqNIbP5Ut91DRE8v6etlTulOHEe_EtKqc&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Bennett-Parker Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited by law from possessing such firearm, provided that such person who is not otherwise prohibited by law from possessing such firearm is 21 years of age or older and does not reside with the person who is subject to the protective order.
Under current law, there is no requirement that such transferee cannot be younger than 21 years of age and cannot reside with such prohibited person.
The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee.
The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession.

[HB1977 \- Weapons; possession prohibited in a hospital that provides mental health or developmental services.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgQRXYx1x4mURqHm1IdC6wRKH2Heo01NGwpLnytEXg5cjaxRIQ9Aq9Eujxdg7Flln4DYHcLDn6Jpf8Ev1_WOuOyrdwiiHjnSjNiUixX1CVKekrb3yO4XOe_-Pls8JUncxR&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Hernandez Weapons; possession prohibited in a hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services; penalty. Makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to knowingly and intentionally possess in the building of any hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services in the Commonwealth, including an emergency department or other facility rendering emergency medical care, a
(i) firearm, (ii) knife with a blade over three and one-half inches, or (iii) other dangerous weapon, including explosives and stun weapons.
The bill also provides that notice of such prohibitions shall be posted conspicuously at each public entrance of any hospital and no person shall be convicted of the offense if such notice is not posted, unless such person had actual notice of the prohibitions.
The bill provides that any such firearm, knife, explosive, or weapon shall be subject to seizure by a law-enforcement officer and forfeited to the Commonwealth and specifies exceptions to the prohibition.

[HB2631 \- Firearms; purchase, at least five day waiting period, penalty.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgCjqh6v630Ls2pdqP_0MAI4ubf2HafhPk1pqcOe0MEWhoD_lVZwDfeSN06ljA1aUJBWRF4tIYEzwenDUTXUG4hLou5c4vUEktwVglWL-Oj--oZXdWtnb2r9WZ85rJQoYt&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Hayes Purchase of firearms; waiting period; penalty. Provides that no person shall sell a firearm unless at least five days have elapsed from the time the prospective purchaser completes the written consent form to have a licensed dealer obtain criminal history record information, with exceptions enumerated in relevant law.
[HB2783 \- Placing swastika on certain property with intent to intimidate; penalty.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg83ADkHRVFNR-uxMbhGBtsow6n34IJYsm8E7J89Vet2HbWNGPVDbuRBehG4_15vOCp2b0tpLr9lXglxiIvjLyWtlkeO70zu9YnpjY7OIprUbvmAUk8y3DQWHDmafbgeaK&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Simon Placing swastika on certain property with intent to intimidate; penalty.

[HB1634 \- Charter; City of Portsmouth.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgfvCIlQwYUtgpa-66GAXiEYDwNnY33RkiqwJfbuz21z2XFL3vXAUHhFKgAPIcWFKnfvnmSUBPKDUS_Oe4YUUEbbGwmao1DMkd5ZY5BGKCduTnjOepagXKUAOwKaQPSe6M&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Hayes Charter; City of Portsmouth. Amends the charter for the City of Portsmouth by authorizing the City Manager to require city departments to implement appropriate enhancement or remedial measures consistent with prevailing law wherever there exists (i) a compelling government interest, (ii) an analysis that documents a statistically significant disparity between the availability and utilization of minority-owned and women-owned businesses, or (iii) direct evidence by minority-owned businesses or women-owned businesses of the impact of race by discrimination.
[HB1764 \- Disposable plastic bag tax; distribution to towns.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgq5B1HBF1KXLf2rOPMeLTV40jObzdGTJVDYqcKz9Qr24KrFPuhaaPlm35cXw7Wdk1L9jGLby0rGmLwTaS98D7tkHiK3jdGV9s6KVkjUylQ2Zyclae6Yiirxouu9_b9jta&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Martinez Disposable plastic bag tax; distribution to towns. Provides that any town located within a county that has imposed a disposable plastic bag tax shall receive a distribution of revenues collected by the county based on the local sales tax distribution formula for appropriations to towns. The bill requires that towns use such revenues for the same purposes allowable for a county or city.
[HB2641 \- Statewide housing targets; requires localities to increase their total housing stock.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgQqC9I36Fiy8xX5CUkqrkct1KRBqHaIVuHSRQf4SaFWAEMOyyEoqA7TRedwn-DkV2670vP_g2ksb62D57inTVn37ovGA8e9_44lPUpmWQjqOmzw7jBJPovRLCCdyYbMcp&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Helmer Statewide housing targets for localities. Requires localities to increase their total housing stock by at least 7.5 percent over the five-year period beginning January 1, 2027. The bill provides that, in order to meet the 7.5 percent growth target, a locality shall develop a housing growth plan that best meets the needs of the locality and may include any of various listed housing growth strategies.
The bill further provides that, after January 1, 2032, an applicant who seeks local government approval for a residential development that will have the effect of increasing the supply of housing in a locality and has that application rejected may, in addition to other remedies, appeal such decision to the Housing Approval Board, which shall be established by the Director of the Department of Housing and Community Development.
The bill authorizes the Housing Approval Board to overturn local decisions and approve applications under certain circumstances. However, if the Housing Approval Board determines that a locality has in good faith implemented at least three of the housing growth strategies listed in the bill and has not rejected more than 25 percent of new housing development proposals over the previous five years, the Housing Approval Board shall allow the local decision to stand.
Finally, the bill provides that the Housing Approval Board shall give extra weight for increases in affordable housing and for the rehabilitation of current, underutilized housing stock. The bill has a delayed effective date of July 1, 2026.

[HB2156 \- Student exchange programs; tuition and mandatory fee waivers, conditions.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg34BxMIxswdumiU1DcQoGw4OIZxN-XG9GgnG8movCuephEumRe9m3_vD_z-bNgMHEqcUKu2vf8AzvUKNHSYu-RrvhXW80OdLy3l-872CPzdtyZ9z6oKS5Ub6UPMhkQye4&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Carr Public institutions of higher education; student exchange programs; tuition and mandatory fee waivers; conditions. Clarifies that tuition and mandatory fees may be waived for a an inbound student enrolled in a public institution of higher education through a formalized student exchange program between such institution and another institution of higher education, provided that the number of inbound students does not exceed the number of outbound students paying full tuition and mandatory fees to the public institution of higher education under the provisions of the exchange program for a given three-year period.

### [HB1649 Board of Medicine; continuing education; unconscious bias and cultural competency.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgwKSuPQyyLkgYlf0DHUO-ezqkHYdUKDMyc5SuJFQNEascsyHKqEA7slYoHuHTPw_WCqYlNmuH0-mlpESJYsjc-LBnD7N-XXqp9F9FvF91q_Jnkl68v5yRbDBLY09742Hf&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==)
Introduced by: [C.E. Cliff Hayes, Jr. (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgP3xZ64mG-btnGwl25Yn3zfwkVNGrKS7_7g_lG5xHnj_muUsx2zGyMfdsOkswwvZK28RkKwl11CNrgzsR3w6xHaYJ1gFRYyj5EtUj5GsYKjmB8tyS21uuumc-mWbnVe5SX9t4ZD8V_O_dT7nxfPgDB-xtUFJDUceNASjrq3Xqu7QKLVSvJeYaVg==&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Board of Medicine; continuing education; unconscious bias and cultural competency. Directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious bias and cultural competency training as part of the continuing education requirements for renewal of licensure. The bill specifies requirements for the training and requires the Board of Medicine to report on the training to the Department of Health and the Virginia Neonatal Perinatal Collaborative.

### [HB1678 School board policies; parental notification; safe storage of prescription drugs and firearms in the household.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgbn6c1eBJju1__TH5qGpwpW0fs5PSziQsxbYL67RKSQcBVtiCZUD6b_IyPvRcxIAWw3jhciYudyIaOFLcmMtZVSCk-7Z2U3kK5rcEM5tiWf8MuWAHmuM38JN0UTOpojzd&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==)
Introduced by: [Laura Jane Cohen (Chief Patron)](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpg14BLSrTnxP49TyT7yKBK8R6waXQqGAZU_D-9poFu3dMTzoAexyl988Ab3d1xRIREQ-Q4O1lYmQ2uJxSQLwKZEAfXD57qXMoN4uDB4SZ_v6a7sTQ7Zhl5sqGhA8E2ZCT3d8bIidpBYhQ6ehTLNLPJe-zBCC8OjuiOBVlW6PTxCVI6SnawWX9DWg==&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) School board policies; parental notification; safe storage of prescription drugs and firearms in the household. Requires each local school board to develop and implement a policy to require the annual notification of the parent of each student enrolled in the local school division, to be sent by email and, if applicable, SMS text message within 30 calendar days succeeding the first day of each school year, of (i) the importance of securely storing any prescription drug, as defined in relevant law, present in the household and (ii) the parent's legal responsibility to safely store any firearm present in the household. The bill requires each school board to make such parental notification available in multiple languages on its website.

| [HB1616 \- Offshore Wind Industry Workforce Program and Fund; established, report, sunset.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgT7XpTsMVb5Krakn8J2Mcec9vonedm069WZUOjd9B8H-YKj5fMgyAM89HaHc9zYv7qhSoOE_RzZYPpUGFPeyY0OoHSjHoV7ddtuVtcIPGxYwhVIYWM5mmnkcEAUoWNVWG&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Feggans Department of Energy; Offshore Wind Industry Workforce Program and Fund. Directs the Director of the Department of Energy to identify and develop training resources to advance workforce development in the offshore wind industry in the Commonwealth.
[HB1791 \- Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund; established and created.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgUdC21shnluBTln766qYxqCnL1ACJDtDPEBzpZr63QCAob3C3w1r0dTXJFuvwQ_rDadNj_rx8amCN7DEWDzYRL7pixjQirSf2r-T6tJ6lqzNby2pv6QkP67rtn9GrLFlX&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Sullivan Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund created. Creates the Electric Vehicle Rural Infrastructure Program and Fund to assist private developers with non-utility costs associated with the installation of electric vehicle charging stations:
(i) in certain localities, (ii) on eligible public land, as defined in the bill, or (iii) within one mile of the boundary of eligible public land.
The bill provides that a private developer may apply for a grant in an amount equal to 70 percent of the private developer's non-utility costs for the installation of such public electric vehicle charging stations.
The awarding of a grant under the program would be conditional upon an agreement with the applicant that any cost of a project not funded by a grant awarded by the program be funded by non-federal funds.
The Department of Energy shall establish guidelines for the administration of the Program, including guidelines related to the application for and award of grants. The bill has an expiration date of July 1, 2030.
[HB1928 \- Minimum wage.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpghjOBueBCwr5QbbsCxnwqZIi7riff7ss_muUW8ss5fPqfGJ59SKwtJBkA3imNjQN6N_WIm0d5vRRmlxlHPf6eYsHEw_mYjjvW2SalD-fYpikUunpjr9ryKybbR2Xdz2CM&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Ward Minimum wage. Increases the minimum wage incrementally to $15.00 per hour by January 1, 2027. The bill codifies the adjusted state hourly minimum wage of $12.41 per hour that is effective January 1, 2025 and increases the minimum wage to $13.50 per hour effective January 1, 2026 and to $15.00 per hour effective January 1, 2027. The bill requires the Commissioner of Labor and Industry to establish an adjusted state hourly minimum wage by October 1, 2027.

| [HB1961 \- Public elementary & secondary school; student cell phone & smart device possession & use policies.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgl1s131lNhJyAxMggEaabhfEqt0ZgGzZp2Gux1rlsNd1__XSes0xP7rmZh7UIyEDQUWkYcUK92or5w5gyaZiMuWN7bcZb9uOXr0zxpwpYjItGuUwpP9a1lgZf6KI9UY_u&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: Rasoul Public elementary and secondary schools; student discipline; student cell phone and smart devicepossession and use policies; development and implementation. Directs each school board to develop and each public elementary and secondary school to implement age-appropriate and developmentally appropriate policies relating to the possession and use of cell phones and smart devices by students on school property from bell to bell, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill requires such policies to: (i) restrict, to the fullest extent possible, student cell phone possession and use in the classroom from bell to bell; (ii) aim to reduce or prevent any distraction in or disruption to the learning environment, including bullying or harassment, that could be caused or facilitated by student cell phone possession and use on school property from bell to bell; (iii) ensure that implementation and enforcement of the policy is the responsibility of the administration, minimizes, to the extent possible, any conflict with the instructional responsibilities of teachers or any disruption to instructional time, and does not involve any school resource officer; (iv) include exceptions to such policies permitting any student, pursuant to an Individualized Education Plan or Section 504 Plan or if otherwise deemed appropriate by the school board, to possess and use a cell phone on school property, including in the classroom, during regular school hours to monitor or address a health concern; and (v) expressly prohibit any student from being suspended or expelled as a consequence of any violation of such policies. Finally, the bill clarifies that (a) no violation of any such student cell phone possession and use policy shall alone constitute sufficient cause for a student's suspension or expulsion from attendance at school and (b) any such violation that involves, coincides with, or results in an instance of disruptive behavior, as that term is defined in applicable law, shall be addressed in accordance with the regulations on codes of student conduct adopted by each school board pursuant to applicable law.
[HB2201 \- Public schools; temporarily employed teachers, rules and requirements, extension of time limitation.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yjaqlZkIdPv8rYeSDyMuvRYMfkzOnQR0q1FcP0VTz7ckSvfvGySDUqnnW6nbmnpgx49U3bTsmawdMVINqYBwOrSRyfl9qOdetZKcPQkBNs9FpxCYJ_kdHXr8LMkiVqEkYn0syP1P3If_qaXrIt90I88kqLB0WQev4I2H4gW97zGAa3pf57JMlNeMTbAN7DVS&c=fFeD7KARGexgE8RO8lxAj3LK4J2ezCqkKrBl4NoSqs7pM811VVuOHA==&ch=neN4KIeK_dIYkM-2bv6y_69mu28OrRFBsxsomdWaGT7d6CML77wkqg==) Patron: McQuinn Public schools; temporarily employed teachers; rules and requirements; extension of time limitation. Extends from 90 to 180 days the maximum period of time during one school year for which a school board may employ a temporarily employed teacher, as defined in relevant law, to fill a teacher vacancy, with certain conditions and restrictions. The bill has an expiration date of July 1, 2027.

| Dear Hello Hope you had a great weekend because it's time to get back to work.
Tomorrow there are a number of gun bills coming up, in violation of Article I Section 13 of the Virginia Constitution. We've seen these before, except by a Senate patron. Now you're seeing what is called a "House companion bill." This is simply the exact same bill, but it is introduced separately as a House bill.
Most of these bills won't actually be heard again. The chair will simply comment that they've already debated and voted on a similar Senate bill along with the vote of that Senate companion and how the bill fared as a Senate bill.
As a gun owner, I'm very concerned that these bills could become the law of the land next year if we don't take back the House and the Governor's office this November.
Virginia has elections every year. We have to stay vigilant. I'm hopeful that just as miracles are occurring at the national level, we can have our own miracle right here in Virginia in 2025.

---
| |
---
It's hard to believe it, but next Saturday, February 22 is the last day of session. That said, we will turn our attention to the budget.
As you may or may not know, by law legislators are required to balance the budget. I've included a copy below for you to review.
Both the House and Senate will each vote on and pass a budget in their respective bodies before coming together in a Conference Committee to hash out the differences between the two budgets.
Stay tuned as I start going through the budget now through next Saturday.
